items.title: Enabling Silent Telemetry Data Transmission with InvisiFlow.
items.abstract: Network applications from traffic engineering to path tracing often rely on the ability to transmit fine-grained telemetry data from network devices to a set of collectors. Unfortunately, prior work has observed—and we validate—that existing transmission methods for such data can result in significant overhead to user traffic and/or loss of telemetry data, particularly when the network is heavily loaded. In this paper, we introduce InvisiFlow, a novel communication substrate to collect network telemetry data, silently. In contrast to previous systems that always push telemetry packets to collectors based on the shortest path, InvisiFlow dynamically seeks out spare network capacity by leveraging opportunistic sending and congestion gradients, thus minimizing both the loss rate of telemetry data and overheads on user traffic. In a FatTree topology, InvisiFlow can achieve near-zero loss rate even under high-load scenarios (around 33.8× lower loss compared to the state-of-the-art transmission methods used by systems like Everflow and Planck).
items.abstract_zh: 从流量工程到路径跟踪的网络应用程序通常依赖于将细粒度遥测数据从网络设备传输到一组收集器的能力。不幸的是，之前的工作已经观察到（并且我们也验证了）此类数据的现有传输方法可能会导致用户流量的巨大开销和/或遥测数据的丢失，特别是在网络负载较重时。在本文中，我们介绍了 InvisiFlow，这是一种以静默方式收集网络遥测数据的新型通信基础。与之前总是基于最短路径将遥测数据包推送到收集器的系统相比，InvisiFlow 通过利用机会发送和拥塞梯度动态寻找空闲网络容量，从而最大限度地减少遥测数据的丢失率和用户流量的开销。在 FatTree 拓扑中，即使在高负载情况下，InvisiFlow 也能实现接近零的丢失率（与 Everflow 和 Planck 等系统使用的最先进的传输方法相比，丢失率降低约 33.8 倍）。

items.title: Achieving Wire-Latency Storage Systems by Exploiting Hardware ACKs.
items.abstract: We present Juneberry, a low-latency communication framework for storage systems. Different from existing RPC frameworks, Juneberry provides a fast path for storage requests: they can be committed with a single round trip and server CPU bypass, thus delivering extremely low latency; the execution of these requests is performed asynchronously on the server CPU. Juneberry achieves it by relying on our proposed Ordered Queue abstraction, which exploits NICs’ hardware ACKs as commit signals of requests while ensuring linearizability of the whole system. Juneberry also supports durability by placing requests in persistent memory (PM). We implement Juneberry using commodity RDMA NICs and integrate it into two storage systems: Memcached (a widely used in-memory caching system) and PMemKV (a PM-based persistent key-value store). Evaluation shows that compared with RPC, Juneberry can significantly lower their latency under write-intensive workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 Juneberry，一种用于存储系统的低延迟通信框架。与现有的 RPC 框架不同，Juneberry 为存储请求提供了快速路径：它们可以通过单次往返和服务器 CPU 旁路来提交，从而提供极低的延迟；这些请求的执行在服务器 CPU 上异步执行。 Juneberry 通过依赖我们提出的有序队列抽象来实现这一目标，该抽象利用 NIC 的硬件 ACK 作为请求的提交信号，同时确保整个系统的线性化。 Juneberry 还通过将请求放入持久内存 (PM) 来支持持久性。我们使用商用 RDMA NIC 实现 Juneberry，并将其集成到两个存储系统中：Memcached（广泛使用的内存缓存系统）和 PMemKV（基于 PM 的持久键值存储）。评估表明，与 RPC 相比，Juneberry 可以显着降低写入密集型工作负载下的延迟。

items.title: Mitigating Scalability Walls of RDMA-based Container Networks.
items.abstract: As a state-of-the-art technique, RDMA-offloaded container networks (RCNs) can provide high-performance data communications among containers. Nevertheless, this seems to be subject to the RCN scale—when there are millions of containers simultaneously running in a data center, the performance decreases sharply and unexpectedly. In particular, we observe that most performance issues are related to RDMA NICs (RNICs), whose design and implementation defects might constitute the "scalability wall" of the RCN. To validate the conjecture, however, we are challenged by the limited visibility into the internals of today's RNICs. To address the dilemma, a more pragmatic approach is to infer the most likely causes of the performance issues according to the common abstractions of an RNIC's components and functionalities. Specifically, we conduct combinatorial causal testing to efficiently reason about an RNIC's architecture model, effectively approximate its performance model, and thereby proactively optimize the NF (network function) offloading schedule. We embody the design into a practical system dubbed ScalaCN. Evaluation on production workloads shows that the end-to-end network bandwidth increases by 1.4× and the packet forwarding latency decreases by 31%, after resolving 82% of the causes inferred by ScalaCN. We report the performance issues of RNICs and the most likely causes to relevant vendors, all of which have been encouragingly confirmed; we are now closely working with the vendors to fix them.
items.abstract_zh: 作为最先进的技术，RDMA 卸载容器网络 (RCN) 可以在容器之间提供高性能数据通信。然而，这似乎受到 RCN 规模的影响——当数据中心有数百万个容器同时运行时，性能会意外地急剧下降。特别是，我们观察到大多数性能问题都与 RDMA NIC（RNIC）有关，其设计和实现缺陷可能构成 RCN 的“可扩展性墙”。然而，为了验证这个猜想，我们面临着对当今 RNIC 内部结构的有限可见性的挑战。为了解决这个困境，更务实的方法是根据 RNIC 组件和功能的通用抽象来推断性能问题的最可能原因。具体来说，我们进行组合因果测试，以有效地推理 RNIC 的架构模型，有效地近似其性能模型，从而主动优化 NF（网络功能）卸载计划。我们将设计融入到一个名为 ScalaCN 的实用系统中。通过生产负载评估，解决了ScalaCN推断的82%原因后，端到端网络带宽提升了1.4倍，报文转发时延降低了31%。我们向相关厂商报告了RNIC的性能问题以及最可能的原因，所有这些都得到了令人鼓舞的证实；我们现在正在与供应商密切合作来解决这些问题。

items.title: Mowgli: Passively Learned Rate Control for Real-Time Video.
items.abstract: Rate control algorithms are at the heart of video conferencing platforms, determining target bitrates that match dynamic network characteristics for high quality. Despite the promise that recent data-driven strategies have shown for this challenging task, the performance degradation that they introduce during training has been a nonstarter for many production services, precluding adoption. This paper aims to bolster the practicality of data-driven rate control by presenting an alternate avenue for experiential learning: using purely existing telemetry logs that we surprisingly observe embed performant decisions but often at the wrong times or in the wrong order. To realize this approach despite the inherent uncertainty that log-based learning brings (i.e., lack of feedback for new decisions), our system, Mowgli, combines a variety of robust learning techniques (i.e., conservatively reasoning about alternate behavior to minimize risk and using a richer model formulation to account for environmental noise). Across diverse networks (emulated and real-world), Mowgli outperforms the widely deployed GCC algorithm, increasing average video bitrates by 15–39% while reducing freeze rates by 60–100%.
items.abstract_zh: 速率控制算法是视频会议平台的核心，可确定与动态网络特征相匹配的目标比特率以实现高质量。尽管最近的数据驱动策略为这项具有挑战性的任务带来了希望，但它们在训练过程中引入的性能下降对于许多生产服务来说是不可能的，阻碍了采用。本文旨在通过提出一种体验式学习的替代途径来增强数据驱动的速率控制的实用性：使用纯粹现有的遥测日志，我们惊讶地观察到嵌入高性能决策，但通常是在错误的时间或以错误的顺序。为了实现这种方法，尽管基于日志的学习带来了固有的不确定性（即缺乏新决策的反馈），我们的系统 Mowgli 结合了各种强大的学习技术（即保守地推理替代行为以最小化风险并使用更丰富的模型公式来解释环境噪声）。在不同的网络（模拟和现实世界）中，Mowgli 的性能优于广泛部署的 GCC 算法，将平均视频比特率提高了 15-39%，同时将冻结率降低了 60-100%。

items.title: Everything Matters in Programmable Packet Scheduling.
items.abstract: Operators can deploy any scheduler they desire on existing switches through programmable packet schedulers: they tag packets with ranks (which indicate their priority) and schedule them in the order of these ranks. The ideal programmable scheduler is the Push-In First-Out (PIFO) queue, which schedules packets in a perfectly sorted order by "pushing" packets into any position of the queue based on their ranks. However, it is hard to implement PIFO queues in hardware due to their need to sort packets at line rate (based on their ranks). Recent proposals approximate PIFO behaviors on existing data-planes. While promising, they fail to simultaneously capture both of the necessary behaviors of PIFO queues: their scheduling behavior and admission control . We introduce PACKS, an approximate PIFO scheduler that addresses this problem. PACKS runs on top of a set of priority queues and uses packet-rank information and queue-occupancy levels during enqueue to determine whether to admit each incoming packet and to which queue it should be mapped. We fully implement PACKS in P4 and evaluate it on real workloads. We show that PACKS better-approximates PIFO than state-of-the-art approaches. Specifically, PACKS reduces the rank inversions by up to 7× and 15× with respect to SP-PIFO and AIFO, and the number of packet drops by up to 60% compared to SP-PIFO. Under pFabric ranks, PACKS reduces the mean FCT across small flows by up to 33% and 2.6×, compared to SP-PIFO and AIFO. We also show that PACKS runs at line rate on existing hardware (Intel Tofino).
items.abstract_zh: 运营商可以通过可编程数据包调度程序在现有交换机上部署他们想要的任何调度程序：他们用等级（指示其优先级）标记数据包，并按照这些等级的顺序调度它们。理想的可编程调度程序是推入先出 (PIFO) 队列，它通过根据数据包的排名将数据包“推”到队列的任何位置，以完美排序的顺序来调度数据包。然而，由于需要以线速对数据包进行排序（基于其等级），因此很难在硬件中实现 PIFO 队列。最近的提案近似于现有数据平面上的 PIFO 行为。虽然很有希望，但它们未能同时捕获 PIFO 队列的两个必要行为：调度行为和准入控制。我们引入了 PACKS，一个近似 PIFO 调度程序来解决这个问题。 PACKS 在一组优先级队列之上运行，并在入队期间使用数据包排名信息和队列占用级别来确定是否接纳每个传入数据包以及应将其映射到哪个队列。我们在 P4 中完全实现了 Packs，并在实际工作负载上对其进行了评估。我们证明 PACKS 比最先进的方法更接近 PIFO。具体来说，与 SP-PIFO 和 AIFO 相比，PACKS 减少了多达 7 倍和 15 倍的排名反转，并且与 SP-PIFO 相比，丢包数量减少了多达 60%。在 pFabric 等级下，与 SP-PIFO 和 AIFO 相比，PACKS 将小流量的平均 FCT 降低高达 33% 和 2.6 倍。我们还展示了 Packs 在现有硬件（Intel Tofino）上以线速运行。

items.title: Tooth: Toward Optimal Balance of Video QoE and Redundancy Cost by Fine-Grained FEC in Cloud Gaming Streaming.
items.abstract: Despite the rapid rise of cloud gaming, real-world evaluations of its quality of experience (QoE) remain scarce. To fill this gap, we conduct a large-scale measurement campaign, analyzing over 60,000 sessions on an operational cloud gaming platform. We find that current cloud gaming streaming suffers from substantial bandwidth wastage and severe interaction stalls simultaneously. In-depth investigation reveals the underlying reason, i.e., existing streaming adopts coarse-grained Forward Error Correction (FEC) encoding, without considering the adverse impact of frame length variation, which results in over-protection of large frames (i.e., bandwidth waste) and under-protection of smaller ones (i.e., interaction stalls). To remedy the problem, we propose Tooth, a per-frame adaptive FEC that aims to achieve the optimal balance between satisfactory QoE and efficient bandwidth usage. To build Tooth, we design a dual-module FEC encoding strategy, which takes full consideration of both frame length variation and network dynamics, and hence determines an appropriate FEC redundancy rate for each frame. Moreover, we also circumvent the formidable per-frame FEC computational overhead by designing a lightweight Tooth, so as to meet the rigid latency bound of real-time cloud gaming. We implement, deploy, and evaluate Tooth in the operational cloud gaming system. Extensive field tests demonstrate that Tooth significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art FEC methods, reducing stall rates by 40.2% to 85.2%, enhancing video bitrates by 11.4% to 29.2%, and lowering bandwidth costs by 54.9% to 75.0%.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管云游戏迅速崛起，但对其体验质量 (QoE) 的现实评估仍然很少。为了填补这一空白，我们开展了大规模的测量活动，分析了运营云游戏平台上的 60,000 多个会话。我们发现当前的云游戏流媒体同时遭受大量带宽浪费和严重的交互停滞。深入调查揭示了根本原因，即现有流媒体采用粗粒度的前向纠错（FEC）编码，没有考虑帧长度变化的不利影响，导致对大帧的过度保护（即带宽浪费）和对较小帧的保护不足（即交互停顿）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Tooth，一种每帧自适应 FEC，旨在实现令人满意的 QoE 和有效带宽使用之间的最佳平衡。为了构建Tooth，我们设计了双模块FEC编码策略，该策略充分考虑帧长度变化和网络动态，从而为每帧确定合适的FEC冗余率。此外，我们还通过设计轻量级Tooth来规避每帧FEC计算开销，以满足实时云游戏的严格延迟限制。我们在运营的云游戏系统中实施、部署和评估 Tooth。广泛的现场测试表明，Tooth 的性能显着优于现有最先进的 FEC 方法，将停顿率降低了 40.2% 至 85.2%，将视频比特率提高了 11.4% 至 29.2%，并将带宽成本降低了 54.9% 至 75.0%。

items.title: Suppressing BGP Zombies with Route Status Transparency.
items.abstract: Withdrawal suppression has been a known weakness of BGP for over a decade. It has a significant detrimental impact on both the reliability and security of inter-domain routing on the Internet. This paper presents Route Status Transparency (RoST), the first design that efficiently and securely thwarts withdrawal suppression misconfigurations and attacks. RoST allows ASes to efficiently verify whether a route has been withdrawn; it is compatible with BGP as well as with BGP security enhancements. We use simulations on the Internet’s AS-level topology to evaluate the benefits from adopting RoST. We use an extensive real-world BGP announcements dataset to show that it is efficient in terms of storage, bandwidth, and computational requirements.
items.abstract_zh: 十多年来，提款抑制一直是 BGP 的一个已知弱点。它对 Internet 上域间路由的可靠性和安全性产生重大不利影响。本文介绍了路由状态透明性 (RoST)，这是第一个能够有效、安全地阻止撤回抑制错误配置和攻击的设计。 RoST可以让AS高效地验证路由是否被撤销；它与 BGP 以及 BGP 安全增强功能兼容。我们使用对互联网 AS 级拓扑的模拟来评估采用 RoST 的好处。我们使用广泛的现实世界 BGP 公告数据集来证明它在存储、带宽和计算要求方面是高效的。

items.title: Shoal++: High Throughput DAG BFT Can Be Fast and Robust!
items.abstract: Today's practical partially synchronous Byzantine Fault Tolerant consensus protocols trade off low latency and high throughput. On the one end, traditional BFT protocols such as PBFT and its derivatives optimize for latency. They require, in fault-free executions, only 3 message delays to commit, the optimum for BFT consensus. However, this class of protocols typically relies on a single leader, hampering throughput scalability. On the other end, a new class of so-called DAG-BFT protocols demonstrates how to achieve highly scalable throughput by separating data dissemination from consensus, and using every replica as proposer. Unfortunately, existing DAG-BFT protocols pay a steep latency premium, requiring on average 10.5 message delays to commit transactions. This work aims to soften this tension, and proposes Shoal++, a novel DAG-based BFT consensus system that offers the throughput of DAGs while reducing end-to-end consensus commit latency to an average of 4.5 message delays. Our empirical findings are encouraging, showing that Shoal++ achieves throughput comparable to state-of-the-art DAG BFT solutions while reducing latency by up to 60%, even under less favorable network and failure conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 当今实用的部分同步拜占庭容错共识协议在低延迟和高吞吐量之间进行了权衡。一方面，传统的 BFT 协议（例如 PBFT 及其衍生品）针对延迟进行了优化。在无故障执行中，它们只需要 3 个消息延迟即可提交，这是 BFT 共识的最佳选择。然而，此类协议通常依赖于单个领导者，从而阻碍了吞吐量可扩展性。另一方面，一类新的所谓 DAG-BFT 协议演示了如何通过将数据传播与共识分离并使用每个副本作为提议者来实现高度可扩展的吞吐量。不幸的是，现有的 DAG-BFT 协议付出了高昂的延迟代价，平均需要 10.5 条消息延迟才能提交交易。这项工作旨在缓解这种紧张局势，并提出了 Shoal++，这是一种新型的基于 DAG 的 BFT 共识系统，它提供 DAG 的吞吐量，同时将端到端共识提交延迟减少到平均 4.5 条消息延迟。我们的实证结果令人鼓舞，表明即使在不太有利的网络和故障条件下，Shoal++ 也能实现与最先进的 DAG BFT 解决方案相当的吞吐量，同时将延迟减少高达 60%。

items.title: Pineapple: Unifying Multi-Paxos and Atomic Shared Registers.
items.abstract: Linearizable storage systems reduce the complexity of developing correct large-scale customer-facing applications, in the presence of concurrent operations and failures. A common approach for providing linearizability is to use consensus to order operations invoked by applications. This paper explores designs that offload operations (from the consensus component) to improve overall performance. This paper presents Pineapple, which uses logical timestamps to unify Multi-Paxos and atomic shared registers so that any node in the system can serve read and write operations. Compared to Multi-Paxos (or leader-based consensus), Pineapple reduces bottlenecks at the leader. Compared to Gryff, which unifies EPaxos and atomic shared registers, Pineapple has better performance because Pineapple has “non-blocking operation execution.” Our evaluation shows that Pineapple improves both throughput and tail latency, compared to state-of-the-art systems (e.g., Gryff, Multi-Paxos, EPaxos), in both wide-area networks and local-area networks. We also integrate Pineapple with etcd. In a balanced workload, Pineapple reduces median latency by more than 50%, compared to the original system that uses an optimized version of Raft.
items.abstract_zh: 在存在并发操作和故障的情况下，线性化存储系统降低了开发正确的大规模面向客户的应用程序的复杂性。提供线性化的常见方法是使用共识来对应用程序调用的操作进行排序。本文探讨了卸载操作（从共识组件）以提高整体性能的设计。本文提出了 Pineapple，它使用逻辑时间戳来统一 Multi-Paxos 和原子共享寄存器，以便系统中的任何节点都可以服务于读写操作。与 Multi-Paxos（或基于领导者的共识）相比，Pineapple 减少了领导者的瓶颈。与统一了 EPaxos 和原子共享寄存器的 Gryff 相比，Pineapple 具有更好的性能，因为 Pineapple 具有“非阻塞操作执行”。我们的评估表明，与最先进的系统（例如 Gryff、Multi-Paxos、EPaxos）相比，Pineapple 在广域网和局域网中都提高了吞吐量和尾部延迟。我们还将 Pineapple 与 etcd 集成。在平衡工作负载下，与使用 Raft 优化版本的原始系统相比，Pineapple 将中值延迟降低了 50% 以上。

items.title: Preventing Network Bottlenecks: Accelerating Datacenter Services with Hotspot-Aware Placement for Compute and Storage.
items.abstract: Datacenter network hotspots, defined as links with persistently high utilization, can lead to performance bottlenecks.In this work, we study hotspots in Google’s datacenter networks. We find that these hotspots occur most frequently at ToR switches and can persist for hours. They are caused mainly by bandwidth demand-supply imbalance, largely due to high demand from network-intensive services, or demand exceeding available bandwidth when compute/storage upgrades outpace ToR bandwidth upgrades. Compounding this issue is bandwidth-independent task/data placement by data-center compute and storage schedulers. We quantify the performance impact of hotspots, and find that they can degrade the end-to-end latency of some distributed applications by over 2× relative to low utilization levels. Finally, we describe simple improvements we deployed. In our cluster scheduler, adding hotspot-aware task placement reduced the number of hot ToRs by 90%; in our distributed file system, adding hotspot-aware data placement reduced p95 network latency by more than 50%. While congestion control, load balancing, and traffic engineering can efficiently utilize paths for a fixed placement, we find hotspot-aware placement – placing tasks and data under ToRs with higher available bandwidth – is crucial for achieving consistently good performance.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心网络热点定义为持续高利用率的链接，可能会导致性能瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们研究了 Google 数据中心网络中的热点。我们发现这些热点最常出现在 ToR 交换机上，并且可能持续数小时。它们主要是由于带宽供需不平衡造成的，很大程度上是由于网络密集型服务的高需求，或者当计算/存储升级超过ToR带宽升级时需求超过可用带宽。数据中心计算和存储调度程序的与带宽无关的任务/数据放置使这个问题变得更加复杂。我们量化了热点对性能的影响，发现相对于低利用率水平，它们可以使某些分布式应用程序的端到端延迟降低超过 2 倍。最后，我们描述了我们部署的简单改进。在我们的集群调度程序中，添加热点感知任务放置将热点 ToR 的数量减少了 90%；在我们的分布式文件系统中，添加热点感知数据放置可将 p95 网络延迟减少 50% 以上。虽然拥塞控制、负载平衡和流量工程可以有效地利用固定放置的路径，但我们发现热点感知放置（将任务和数据放置在具有更高可用带宽的 ToR 下）对于实现一致的良好性能至关重要。

items.title: Learnings from Deploying Network QoS Alignment to Application Priorities for Storage Services.
items.abstract: To ensure that application network traffic is prioritized correctly within data center networks, it is critical to align the configuration of network QoS in packets to the intended priority of the application. These QoS configurations, typically encoded in the DSCP bits in the IP header, are interpreted by network switches and routers to determine the resources such as buffer space and scheduling priorities, for network traffic. Conceptually, it appears fairly straightforward to map the application priorities within data center networks to network QoS configurations, as long as the mapping is well defined. In this work, we describe our experience of aligning network QoS settings for intra-cluster storage traffic to application priorities on a per-RPC basis for a large data center network, with well-defined static mappings from priorities to QoS traffic classes. We describe some unexpected insights learned from the deployment experiences, e.g., downgrading traffic to use a lower QoS does not always imply worse network latency due to over-used QoS bands in the network. We also share some challenges encountered along the way to reach the goal of a fleet-wide deployment, including the concerns of potential performance regressions due to QoS downgrades. These lessons provide guidance on the use of a QoS-based scheduling strategy to meet service guarantees and can be deployed to networks of any scale.
items.abstract_zh: To ensure that application network traffic is prioritized correctly within data center networks, it is critical to align the configuration of network QoS in packets to the intended priority of the application.这些 QoS 配置通常编码在 IP 标头中的 DSCP 位中，由网络交换机和路由器解释以确定网络流量的资源，例如缓冲区空间和调度优先级。从概念上讲，只要映射定义明确，将数据中心网络内的应用程序优先级映射到网络 QoS 配置似乎相当简单。在这项工作中，我们描述了在大型数据中心网络的每个 RPC 基础上将集群内存储流量的网络 QoS 设置与应用程序优先级对齐的经验，并具有从优先级到 QoS 流量类别的明确定义的静态映射。我们描述了从部署经验中学到的一些意想不到的见解，例如，降级流量以使用较低的 QoS 并不总是意味着由于网络中过度使用 QoS 频段而导致更糟糕的网络延迟。我们还分享了在实现全机队部署目标的过程中遇到的一些挑战，包括由于 QoS 降级而导致潜在性能下降的担忧。这些课程为使用基于 QoS 的调度策略来满足服务保证提供了指导，并且可以部署到任何规模的网络。

items.title: Making Serverless Pay-For-Use a Reality with Leopard.
items.abstract: Serverless computing has gained traction due to its event-driven architecture and “pay for use” (PFU) billing model. However, our analysis reveals that current billing practices do not align with true resource consumption. This paper challenges the prevailing SLIM (static, linear, interactive-only model) assumptions that underpin existing billing models, demonstrating that current billing does not realize PFU for realistic workloads. We introduce the Nearly Pay-for-Use (NPFU) billing model, which accommodates varying CPU and memory demands, spot cores, and preemptible memory. We also introduce Leopard, an NPFU-based serverless platform that integrates billing awareness into several major subsystems: CPU scheduler, OOM killer, admission controller, and cluster scheduler. Experimental results indicate that Leopard benefits both providers and users, increasing throughput by more than 2x and enabling cost reductions.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算因其事件驱动架构和“按使用付费”(PFU) 计费模式而受到关注。然而，我们的分析表明，当前的计费实践与真实的资源消耗并不相符。本文对支撑现有计费模型的主流 SLIM（静态、线性、纯交互模型）假设提出了挑战，表明当前计费并未针对实际工作负载实现 PFU。我们引入了按使用付费 (NPFU) 计费模型，该模型可适应不同的 CPU 和内存需求、现货核心和可抢占内存。我们还介绍了 Leopard，这是一个基于 NPFU 的无服务器平台，它将计费感知集成到几个主要子系统中：CPU 调度程序、OOM 杀手、准入控制器和集群调度程序。实验结果表明，Leopard 对提供商和用户都有利，将吞吐量提高了 2 倍以上，并降低了成本。

items.title: Scaling IP Lookup to Large Databases using the CRAM Lens.
items.abstract: Wide-area scaling trends require new approaches to Internet Protocol (IP) lookup, enabled by modern networking chips such as Intel Tofino, AMD Pensando, and Nvidia BlueField, which provide substantial ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM) and static random-access memory (SRAM). However, designing and evaluating scalable algorithms for these chips is challenging due to hardware-level constraints. To address this, we introduce the CRAM (CAM+RAM) lens, a framework that combines a formal model for evaluating algorithms on modern network processors with a set of optimization idioms. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CRAM by designing and evaluating three new IP lookup schemes: RESAIL, BSIC, and MashUp. RESAIL enables Tofino-2 to scale to 2.25 million IPv4 prefixes—likely sufficient for the next decade—while a pure TCAM approach supports only 250k prefixes, just 27% of the current global IPv4 routing table. Similarly, BSIC scales to 390k IPv6 prefixes on Tofino-2, supporting 3.2 times as many prefixes as a pure TCAM implementation. In contrast, existing state-of-the-art algorithms, SAIL for IPv4 and Hi-BST for IPv6, scale to considerably smaller sizes on Tofino-2.
items.abstract_zh: 广域扩展趋势需要新的互联网协议 (IP) 查找方法，而现代网络芯片（例如 Intel Tofino、AMD Pensando 和 Nvidia BlueField）可提供大量三态内容寻址存储器 (TCAM) 和静态随机存取存储器 (SRAM)。然而，由于硬件级的限制，设计和评估这些芯片的可扩展算法具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 CRAM (CAM+RAM) 镜头，该框架将用于评估现代网络处理器上的算法的形式模型与一组优化习惯相结合。我们通过设计和评估三种新的 IP 查找方案来证明 CRAM 的有效性：RESAIL、BSIC 和 MashUp。 RESAIL 使 Tofino-2 能够扩展到 225 万个 IPv4 前缀（可能足够未来十年使用），而纯 TCAM 方法仅支持 25 万个前缀，仅占当前全球 IPv4 路由表的 27%。同样，BSIC 在 Tofino-2 上扩展到 390k IPv6 前缀，支持的前缀数量是纯 TCAM 实现的 3.2 倍。相比之下，现有最先进的算法（用于 IPv4 的 SAIL 和用于 IPv6 的 Hi-BST）在 Tofino-2 上可扩展到相当小的尺寸。

items.title: ClubHeap: A High-Speed and Scalable Priority Queue for Programmable Packet Scheduling.
items.abstract: While PIFO is a powerful priority queue abstraction to support programmable packet scheduling in network devices, the efficient implementation of PIFO faces multiple challenges in performance and scalability. The existing solutions all fall short of certain requirements. In this paper, we propose ClubHeap to address the problem. On the one hand, we develop a novel hardware-friendly heap data structure to support faster PIFO queue operations that can schedule a flow in every clock cycle, reaching the theoretical lower bound; on the other hand, the optimized hardware architecture reduces the circuit complexity and thus enables a higher clock frequency. The end result is the best scheduling performance in its class. Combined with its inherently better scalability and flexibility, ClubHeap is an ideal solution to be built in programmable switches and SmartNICs to support various scheduling algorithms. We build an FPGA-based hardware prototype and conduct a thorough evaluation by comparing ClubHeap with the other state-of-the-art solutions. ClubHeap also allows graceful trade-offs between throughput and resource consumption through parameter adjustments, making it adaptable on different target devices.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然 PIFO 是一种强大的优先级队列抽象，可支持网络设备中的可编程数据包调度，但 PIFO 的高效实施面临着性能和可扩展性方面的多重挑战。现有的解决方案都达不到一定的要求。在本文中，我们提出 ClubHeap 来解决这个问题。一方面，我们开发了一种新颖的硬件友好堆数据结构，以支持更快的 PIFO 队列操作，可以在每个时钟周期调度一个流，达到理论下限；另一方面，优化的硬件架构降低了电路复杂度，从而实现了更高的时钟频率。最终结果是同类产品中最佳的调度性能。结合其固有的更好的可扩展性和灵活性，ClubHeap 是内置于可编程交换机和 SmartNIC 中以支持各种调度算法的理想解决方案。我们构建了一个基于 FPGA 的硬件原型，并通过将 ClubHeap 与其他最先进的解决方案进行比较来进行彻底的评估。 ClubHeap还允许通过参数调整在吞吐量和资源消耗之间进行优雅的权衡，使其能够适应不同的目标设备。

items.title: eTran: Extensible Kernel Transport with eBPF.
items.abstract: Evolving datacenters with diverse application demands are driving network transport designs. However, few have successfully landed in the widely-used kernel networking stack to benefit broader users, and they take multiple years. We present eTran, a system that makes kernel transport extensible to implement and customize diverse transport designs agilely. To achieve this, eTran leverages and extends eBPF-based techniques to customize the kernel to support complex transport functionalities safely. Meanwhile, eTran carefully absorbs user-space transport techniques for performance gain without sacrificing robust protection. We implement TCP (with DCTCP congestion control) and Homa under eTran, and achieve up to 4.8×/1.8× higher throughput with 3.7×/7.5× lower latency compared to existing kernel implementation.
items.abstract_zh: 不断发展的数据中心具有多样化的应用需求，正在推动网络传输设计。然而，很少有人能够成功进入广泛使用的内核网络堆栈以使更广泛的用户受益，而且需要多年的时间。我们推出了 eTran，这是一个使内核传输可扩展的系统，可以灵活地实现和定制不同的传输设计。为了实现这一目标，eTran 利用并扩展了基于 eBPF 的技术来定制内核，以安全地支持复杂的传输功能。同时，eTran 仔细吸收了用户空间传输技术以提高性能，同时又不牺牲强大的保护。我们在 eTran 下实现了 TCP（具有 DCTCP 拥塞控制）和 Homa，与现有内核实现相比，吞吐量提高了 4.8×/1.8×，延迟降低了 3.7×/7.5×。

items.title: Minder: Faulty Machine Detection for Large-scale Distributed Model Training.
items.abstract: Large-scale distributed model training requires simultaneous training on up to thousands of machines. Faulty machine detection is critical when an unexpected fault occurs in a machine. From our experience, a training task can encounter two faults per day on average, possibly leading to a halt for hours. To address the drawbacks of the time-consuming and labor-intensive manual scrutiny, we propose Minder, an automatic faulty machine detector for distributed training tasks. The key idea of Minder is to automatically and efficiently detect faulty distinctive monitoring metric patterns, which could last for a period before the entire training task comes to a halt. Minder has been deployed in our production environment for over one year, monitoring daily distributed training tasks where each involves up to thousands of machines. In our real-world fault detection scenarios, Minder can accurately and efficiently react to faults within 3.6 seconds on average, with a precision of 0.904 and F1-score of 0.893.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模分布式模型训练需要在多达数千台机器上同时训练。当机器发生意外故障时，故障机器检测至关重要。根据我们的经验，训练任务平均每天会遇到两次故障，可能会导致停止几个小时。为了解决手动检查耗时耗力的缺点，我们提出了 Minder，一种用于分布式训练任务的自动故障机器检测器。 Minder 的关键思想是自动有效地检测错误的独特监控指标模式，这种模式可能会在整个训练任务停止之前持续一段时间。 Minder 已经在我们的生产环境中部署了一年多，监控日常分布式训练任务，每个任务涉及多达数千台机器。在我们的实际故障检测场景中，Minder 平均可以在 3.6 秒内准确高效地响应故障，精度为 0.904，F1 分数为 0.893。

items.title: Runtime Protocol Refinement Checking for Distributed Protocol Implementations.
items.abstract: Despite significant progress in verifying protocols, services that implement distributed protocols (we refer to these as DPIs in what follows), e.g., Chubby or Etcd, can exhibit safety bugs in production deployments. These bugs are often introduced by programmers when converting protocol descriptions into code. This paper introduces Runtime Protocol Refinement Checking (RPRC) a runtime approach for detecting protocol implementation bugs in DPIs. RPRC systems observe a deployed DPI's runtime behavior and notify operators when this behavior evidences a protocol implementation bug, allowing operators to mitigate the bugs impact and developers to fix the bug. We have developed an algorithm for RPRC and implemented it in a system called Ellsberg that targets DPIs that assume fail-stop failures and the asynchronous (or partially synchronous) model. Our goal when designing Ellsberg was to make no assumptions about how DPIs are implemented, and to avoid additional coordination or communication. Therefore, Ellsberg builds on the observation that in the absence of Byzantine failures, a protocol safety properties are maintained if all live DPI processes correctly implement the protocol. Thus, Ellsberg checks RPRC by comparing messages sent and received by each DPI process to those produced by a simulated execution of the protocol. We apply Ellsberg to three open source DPIs, Etcd, Zookeeper and Redis Raft, and show that we can detect previously reported protocol bugs in these DPIs.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管在验证协议方面取得了重大进展，但实现分布式协议（我们在下文中将其称为 DPI）的服务（例如 Chubby 或 Etcd）可能会在生产部署中出现安全错误。这些错误通常是程序员在将协议描述转换为代码时引入的。本文介绍了运行时协议细化检查 (RPRC)，一种用于检测 DPI 中协议实现错误的运行时方法。 RPRC 系统观察已部署的 DPI 的运行时行为，并在该行为证明存在协议实现错误时通知操作员，从而允许操作员减轻错误影响并允许开发人员修复错误。我们开发了一种 RPRC 算法，并在名为 Ellsberg 的系统中实现它，该系统针对假设故障停止故障和异步（或部分同步）模型的 DPI。我们设计 Ellsberg 时的目标是不对 DPI 的实施方式做出任何假设，并避免额外的协调或沟通。因此，Ellsberg 的观察结果是，在没有拜占庭故障的情况下，如果所有实时 DPI 进程都正确实现了协议，则可以维持协议安全属性。因此，Ellsberg 通过将每个 DPI 进程发送和接收的消息与协议模拟执行生成的消息进行比较来检查 RPRC。我们将 Ellsberg 应用于三个开源 DPI：Etcd、Zookeeper 和 Redis Raft，并表明我们可以检测到这些 DPI 中先前报告的协议错误。

items.title: Evolution of Aegis: Fault Diagnosis for AI Model Training Service in Production.
items.abstract: Despite the success of diagnosis systems in traditional cloud computing, these systems are not suitable for pinpointing faults in AI model training cloud scenarios due to the differences in computing paradigms between traditional cloud computing and model training. As one of the largest cloud providers, we present Aegis, a fault diagnosis system specifically designed for AI model training service. We share our experience in the motivation, design, and evolution of Aegis. Keeping easy-to-deploy as the primary principle, Aegis Phase- 1 started by enhancing existing general-purpose diagnosis systems. After several months of evolution, Aegis Phase-2 cogitatively chose to customize the collective communication library for sophisticated failure localization in runtime without modifying customer code. Besides the failure localization, we further equipped Aegis with the capabilities on handling performance degradation and failure checking before delivery. Aegis has been deployed in our production training cloud service for one year. Aegis decreases more than 97% of the idle time wasted by diagnosis, 84% of the training task restart count and 71% of the performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管传统云计算中的诊断系统取得了成功，但由于传统云计算和模型训练之间计算范式的差异，这些系统并不适合AI模型训练云场景中的故障定位。作为最大的云提供商之一，我们推出了专为AI模型训练服务设计的故障诊断系统Aegis。我们分享我们在 Aegis 的动机、设计和演变方面的经验。 Aegis 第一阶段以易于部署为首要原则，从增强现有的通用诊断系统开始。经过几个月的演变，Aegis Phase-2深思熟虑地选择定制集体通信库，以在不修改客户代码的情况下在运行时实现复杂的故障定位。除了故障定位之外，我们还为Aegis配备了处理性能下降和交付前故障检查的能力。 Aegis已在我们的生产培训云服务中部署一年了。 Aegis 减少了超过 97% 的诊断浪费时间、84% 的训练任务重启次数以及 71% 的性能下降。

items.title: PRED: Performance-oriented Random Early Detection for Consistently Stable Performance in Datacenters.
items.abstract: For decades, Random Early Detection (RED) has been integrated into datacenter switches as a fundamental Active Queue Management (AQM). Accurate configuration of RED parameters is crucial to achieving high throughput and low latency. However, due to the highly dynamic nature of workloads in datacenter networks, maintaining consistently high performance with statically configured RED thresholds poses a challenge. Prior art applies reinforcement learning to predict proper thresholds, but their real-world deployment has been hindered by poor tail performance caused by instability. In this paper, we propose PRED, a novel system that enables automatic and stable RED parameter adjustment in response to traffic dynamics. PRED uses two loosely coupled systems, Flow Concurrent Stabilizer (FCS) and Queue Length Adjuster (QLA), to overcome the challenges of dynamically setting RED parameters to adapt to the ever-changing traffic pattern. We perform extensive evaluations on our physical testbed and large-scale simulations. The results demonstrate that PRED can keep up with the real-time network dynamics generated by realistic workloads. For instance, compared with the static-threshold-based methods, PRED keeps 66%lower switch queue length and obtains up to 80% lower Flow Completion Time (FCT). Compared with the state-of-the-art learning-based method, PRED reduces the tail FCT by 34%.
items.abstract_zh: 几十年来，随机早期检测 (RED) 已作为基本的主动队列管理 (AQM) 集成到数据中心交换机中。 RED 参数的准确配置对于实现高吞吐量和低延迟至关重要。然而，由于数据中心网络中工作负载的高度动态特性，通过静态配置的 RED 阈值保持一致的高性能构成了挑战。现有技术应用强化学习来预测适当的阈值，但它们在现实世界中的部署因不稳定导致的尾部性能不佳而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了 PRED，这是一种新颖的系统，可以根据交通动态自动稳定地调整 RED 参数。 PRED 使用两个松散耦合的系统：流量并发稳定器 (FCS) 和队列长度调整器 (QLA)，来克服动态设置 RED 参数以适应不断变化的流量模式的挑战。我们对物理测试台和大规模模拟进行了广泛的评估。结果表明，PRED 可以跟上实际工作负载生成的实时网络动态。例如，与基于静态阈值的方法相比，PRED 的交换机队列长度减少了 66%，流完成时间 (FCT) 减少了 80%。与最先进的基于学习的方法相比，PRED 将尾部 FCT 降低了 34%。

items.title: DISC: Backpressure Mitigation In Multi-tier Applications With Distributed Shared Connection.
items.abstract: Most data-center applications are based on a multi-tier architecture, involving either coarse-grained software components (e.g., traditional 3-tier web applications) or fine-grained ones (e.g., microservices). Such applications are prone to the backpressure problem, which introduces a strong performance coupling between tiers, thus degrading scalability and resource consumption. This problem is due to the fact that, on the response path towards the initial client, a significant fraction of the payloads in the messages exchanged between tiers correspond to “final” data that are simply relayed (i.e., without further modifications) from a backend tier such as a database. This traffic results in additional pressure on the intermediate and frontend tiers. To address this problem, we introduce DISC, a system allowing several tiers within a multi-tier chain to jointly act as endpoints of the same TCP connection. This enables the selective bypass of one or several tiers on the response path. Unlike existing solutions, DISC is (1) flexible — it accommodates arbitrary multi-tier topologies and heterogeneous application-level protocols, (2) fine-grained — it allows multiple tiers to be involved in the generation and emission of a given response message (e.g., to decouple the network path of the response headers and footers from the path of the response body), (3) and non-intrusive — it requires only minor and localized/modular modifications to the code base of legacy applications and is transparent for external clients. Evaluation results with several micro- and macro-benchmarks show that DISC can reduce the cumulative CPU load on servers by up to 41.5%, decrease the average and tail latencies respectively by up to 74.1% and 5.71×, and also improve the request rate by up to 45%.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数数据中心应用程序都基于多层架构，涉及粗粒度软件组件（例如传统的三层 Web 应用程序）或细粒度软件组件（例如微服务）。此类应用程序很容易出现背压问题，从而在层之间引入强烈的性能耦合，从而降低可扩展性和资源消耗。这个问题的原因是，在通往初始客户端的响应路径上，层之间交换的消息中的有效负载的很大一部分对应于从后端层（例如数据库）简单中继（即，没有进一步修改）的“最终”数据。这种流量会给中间层和前端层带来额外的压力。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 DISC，该系统允许多层链中的多个层共同充当同一 TCP 连接的端点。这使得能够选择性地绕过响应路径上的一层或多层。与现有解决方案不同，DISC 具有以下特点：(1) 灵活 — 它适应任意多层拓扑和异构应用程序级协议；(2) 细粒度 — 它允许多个层参与给定响应消息的生成和发送（例如，将响应标头和页脚的网络路径与响应正文的路径解耦）；(3) 且非侵入性 — 它只需要对遗留应用程序的代码库进行较小的本地化/模块化修改，并且是透明的对于外部客户。多个微观和宏观基准的评估结果表明，DISC可以将服务器上的累积CPU负载降低高达41.5%，将平均延迟和尾延迟分别降低高达74.1%和5.71倍，并将请求率提高高达45%。

items.title: ValidaTor: Domain Validation over Tor.
items.abstract: Domain Validation (DV) is the primary method used by Certificate Authorities (CAs) to confirm administrative control over a domain before issuing digital certificates. Despite its widespread use, DV is vulnerable to various attacks, prompting the adoption of multiple vantage points to enhance security, such as the state of the art DV mechanism supported by Let’s Encrypt. However, even distributed static vantage points remain susceptible to targeted attacks. In this paper we introduce ValidaTor, an HTTP-based domain validation system that leverages the Tor network to create a distributed and unpredictable set of validators. By utilizing Tor’s exit nodes, ValidaTor significantly increases the pool of available validators, providing high path diversity and resilience against strong adversaries. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that ValidaTor can achieve the validation throughput of a commercial CA and has the potential to scale to a validation volume comparable to Let’s Encrypt, while using minimal dedicated infrastructure and only a small fraction (~0.1%) of Tor’s available bandwidth. While unpredictable selection of validators makes ValidaTor fully resistant to targeted attacks on validators, we also show the use of Tor nodes improves path diversity and thereby the resilience of DV to subversion by well-positioned ASes, reducing the number of Autonomous Systems (ASes) capable of issuing fraudulent certificates by up to 27% compared to Let’s Encrypt. Lastly, we show that the chance of subversion by malicious, colluding exit nodes is negligible (≤ 1% even with a quarter of existing exit nodes). We make the code of ValidaTor as well as the datasets and measurements publicly available for use, reproduction, and future research.
items.abstract_zh: 域验证 (DV) 是证书颁发机构 (CA) 在颁发数字证书之前确认对域的管理控制的主要方法。尽管使用广泛，但 DV 很容易受到各种攻击，因此需要采用多种优势来增强安全性，例如 Let’s Encrypt 支持的最先进的 DV 机制。然而，即使是分布式静态有利点仍然容易受到有针对性的攻击。在本文中，我们介绍了 ValidaTor，这是一个基于 HTTP 的域验证系统，它利用 Tor 网络创建一组分布式且不可预测的验证器。通过利用 Tor 的出口节点，ValidaTor 显着增加了可用验证器池，提供高路径多样性和抵御强大对手的弹性。我们的实证评估表明，ValidaTor 可以实现商业 CA 的验证吞吐量，并且有潜力扩展到与 Let’s Encrypt 相当的验证量，同时使用最少的专用基础设施和 Tor 可用带宽的一小部分 (~0.1%)。虽然验证器的不可预测性选择使 ValidaTor 能够完全抵御针对验证器的针对性攻击，但我们还表明，Tor 节点的使用提高了路径多样性，从而提高了 DV 对定位良好的 AS 颠覆的弹性，与 Let’s Encrypt 相比，能够将能够颁发欺诈证书的自治系统 (AS) 数量减少高达 27%。最后，我们表明，恶意、共谋的出口节点颠覆的可能性可以忽略不计（即使现有出口节点有四分之一，该可能性也≤ 1%）。我们公开 ValidaTor 的代码以及数据集和测量结果，以供使用、复制和未来研究。

items.title: Large Network UWB Localization: Algorithms and Implementation.
items.abstract: Localization of networked nodes is an essential problem in emerging applications, including first-responder navigation, automated manufacturing lines, vehicular and drone navigation, asset tracking, Internet of Things, and 5G communication networks. In this paper, we present Locate3D, a novel system for peer-to-peer node localization and orientation estimation in large networks. Unlike traditional range-only methods, Locate3D introduces angle-of-arrival (AoA) data as an added network topology constraint. The system solves three key challenges: it uses angles to reduce the number of measurements required by 4× and jointly uses range and angle data for location estimation. We develop a spanning-tree approach for fast location updates, and to ensure the output graphs are rigid and uniquely realizable, even in occluded or weakly connected areas. Locate3D cuts down latency by up to 75% without compromising accuracy, surpassing standard range-only solutions. It has a 0.86 meter median localization error for building-scale multi-floor networks (32 nodes, 0 anchors) and 12.09 meters for large-scale networks (100,000 nodes, 15 anchors).
items.abstract_zh: 网络节点的本地化是新兴应用中的一个重要问题，包括急救人员导航、自动化生产线、车辆和无人机导航、资产跟踪、物联网和 5G 通信网络。在本文中，我们提出了 Locate3D，这是一种用于大型网络中点对点节点定位和方向估计的新颖系统。与传统的仅范围方法不同，Locate3D 引入了到达角 (AoA) 数据作为附加的网络拓扑约束。该系统解决了三个关键挑战：使用角度将所需的测量次数减少 4 倍，并联合使用距离和角度数据进行位置估计。我们开发了一种用于快速位置更新的生成树方法，并确保输出图是刚性的且唯一可实现的，即使在遮挡或弱连接区域也是如此。 Locate3D 在不影响准确性的情况下将延迟减少高达 75%，超越了标准的仅范围解决方案。对于建筑规模的多层网络（32 个节点，0 个锚点），其中位定位误差为 0.86 米；对于大型网络（100,000 个节点，15 个锚点），其中位定位误差为 12.09 米。

items.title: HA/TCP: A Reliable and Scalable Framework for TCP Network Functions.
items.abstract: Layer 7 network functions (NFs) are a critical piece of modern network infrastructure. As a result, the scalability and reliability of these NFs are important but challenging because of the complexity of layer 7 NFs. This paper presents HA/TCP, a framework that enables migration and failover of layer 7 NFs. HA/TCP uses a novel replication mechanism to synchronize the state between replicas with low overhead, enabling seamless migration and failover of TCP connections. HA/TCP encapsulates the implementation details into our replicated socket interface to allow developers to easily add high availability to their layer 7 NFs such as WAN accelerators, load balancers, and proxies. Our benchmarks show that HA/TCP provides reliability for a 100 Gbps NF with as little as 0.2% decrease in client throughput. HA/TCP transparently migrates a connection between replicas in 38 µs, including the network latency. We provide reliability to a SOCKS proxy and a WAN accelerator with less than 2% decrease in throughput and a modest increase in CPU usage.
items.abstract_zh: 第 7 层网络功能 (NF) 是现代网络基础设施的关键部分。因此，由于第 7 层 NF 的复杂性，这些 NF 的可扩展性和可靠性非常重要，但也具有挑战性。本文介绍了 HA/TCP，这是一个支持第 7 层 NF 迁移和故障转移的框架。 HA/TCP 使用新颖的复制机制以较低的开销同步副本之间的状态，从而实现 TCP 连接的无缝迁移和故障转移。 HA/TCP 将实现细节封装到我们的复制套接字接口中，使开发人员能够轻松地为其第 7 层 NF 添加高可用性，例如 WAN 加速器、负载均衡器和代理。我们的基准测试表明，HA/TCP 为 100 Gbps NF 提供了可靠性，而客户端吞吐量仅下降了 0.2%。 HA/TCP transparently migrates a connection between replicas in 38 µs, including the network latency.我们为 SOCKS 代理和 WAN 加速器提供可靠性，吞吐量下降不到 2%，CPU 使用率略有增加。

items.title: Accelerating Design Space Exploration for LLM Training Systems with Multi-experiment Parallel Simulation.
items.abstract: The rapid expansion of large language models (LLMs) requires the development of extensive GPU clusters, with companies deploying clusters with tens to hundreds of thousands of GPUs. This growth significantly expands the design space for LLM training systems, requiring thorough exploration of different parallelization strategies, communication parameters, congestion control, fabric topology, etc. Current methods require up to 10k simulation experiments to identify optimal configurations, with inadequate exploration leading to significant degradation of training performance. In this paper, we tackle the overlooked problem of efficiently conducting parallel simulation experiments for design space exploration. Our analysis and experiments show that Single-process Multi-experiment (SPME) achieves superior performance by reducing scheduling overhead and optimizing resource utilization, yet remains insufficient for current AI cluster scales. To enhance SPME’s efficacy, we introduce Multiverse, a novel GPU-based AI training simulator. Multiverse leverages the computing throughput of GPUs efficiently with optimizations such as a pull-based synchronization, highfidelity intra-server communication, and a kernel-fusion technique. Extensive experiments validate the accuracy and efficiency of Multiverse, demonstrating less than 3.0% discrepancy with real-world LLM training on clusters of up to 54,000 GPUs, achieving 43.1−73.2X speedup over state-of-the-art CPU-based simulators in various use cases.
items.abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的快速扩展需要开发大量的GPU集群，企业部署的集群有数万到数十万个GPU。这种增长显着扩展了 LLM 训练系统的设计空间，需要对不同的并行化策略、通信参数、拥塞控制、结构拓扑等进行彻底探索。当前的方法需要多达 10k 的模拟实验来确定最佳配置，探索不充分会导致训练性能显着下降。在本文中，我们解决了为设计空间探索有效进行并行仿真实验的被忽视的问题。我们的分析和实验表明，单进程多实验（SPME）通过减少调度开销和优化资源利用率实现了卓越的性能，但对于当前的人工智能集群规模来说仍然不足。为了增强 SPME 的功效，我们引入了 Multiverse，这是一种基于 GPU 的新型 AI 训练模拟器。 Multiverse 通过基于拉动的同步、高保真服务器内通信和内核融合技术等优化，有效地利用 GPU 的计算吞吐量。大量实验验证了 Multiverse 的准确性和效率，证明与在多达 54,000 个 GPU 的集群上进行的真实 LLM 训练的差异不到 3.0%，在各种用例中比最先进的基于 CPU 的模拟器实现了 43.1−73.2 倍的加速。

items.title: The Benefits and Limitations of User Interrupts for Preemptive Userspace Scheduling.
items.abstract: Preemptive scheduling promises to mitigate head-of-line blocking and enable flexible scheduling while retaining a simple programming model. Despite this, preemption is underutilized in server-side software today. Instead, high-performance datacenter systems and language runtimes often rely on cooperative concurrency, or else use preemption only at very coarse timescales, limiting its effectiveness. A key reason that preemption is underutilized today is that existing preemption mechanisms have high and unpredictable overheads. Intel recently introduced support for user interrupts, a new feature that offers an opportunity to change this. By enabling interrupts to be sent and received entirely in user space, user interrupts can significantly lower the overhead of preemption. In this paper, we shed light on how user interrupts impact the landscape of preemption mechanisms. We build two user-level schedulers that leverage user interrupts for low-overhead preemption. We find that user interrupts are not a panacea. For example, they provide limited benefits when other software layers constrain the kinds of scheduling policies that can be used. Still, user interrupts can match or exceed the performance of existing mechanisms for all but the highest preemption rates, while achieving much more consistent overheads and retaining a user friendly programming model.
items.abstract_zh: 抢占式调度有望减轻队头阻塞并实现灵活的调度，同时保留简单的编程模型。尽管如此，抢占在当今的服务器端软件中并未得到充分利用。相反，高性能数据中心系统和语言运行时通常依赖于协作并发，或者仅在非常粗略的时间尺度上使用抢占，从而限制了其有效性。目前抢占未得到充分利用的一个关键原因是现有的抢占机制具有较高且不可预测的开销。英特尔最近推出了对用户中断的支持，这一新功能为改变这一现状提供了机会。通过使中断完全在用户空间中发送和接收，用户中断可以显着降低抢占的开销。在本文中，我们阐明了用户中断如何影响抢占机制的前景。我们构建了两个用户级调度程序，它们利用用户中断来实现低开销抢占。我们发现用户中断并不是万能的。例如，当其他软件层限制可以使用的调度策略类型时，它们提供的好处有限。尽管如此，除了最高抢占率之外，用户中断可以匹配或超过现有机制的性能，同时实现更加一致的开销并保留用户友好的编程模型。

items.title: Efficient Multi-WAN Transport for 5G with OTTER.
items.abstract: In the ongoing cloudiﬁcation of 5G, software network functions (NFs) are replacing ﬁxed-function network hardware, allowing 5G network operators to leverage the beneﬁts of cloud computing. The migration of NFs and their management to the cloud causes 5G trafﬁc to traverse an operator’s wide-area network (WAN) to the cloud WAN that hosts the datacenters (DCs) running 5G NFs and applications. However, achieving end-to-end (E2E) performance for 5G trafﬁc across two WANs is hard. Placing 5G ﬂows across two WANs with different performance and reliability characteristics, edge and DC resource constraints, and interference from other ﬂows is different and more challenging than single-WAN trafﬁc engineering. We address this challenge and show that orchestrating E2E paths across a multi-WAN overlay allows us to achieve average 13% more throughput, 15% less RTT, 45% less jitter, or reduce average loss from 0.06% to under 0.001%. We implement our multi-WAN 5G ﬂow placement in a scalable optimization prototype that allocates 26%–45% more bytes on the network than greedy baselines while also satisfying the service demands of more ﬂows.
items.abstract_zh: 在正在进行的 5G 云化过程中，软件网络功能 (NF) 正在取代固定功能网络硬件，使 5G 网络运营商能够充分利用云计算的优势。 NF 及其管理向云的迁移导致 5G 流量穿过运营商的广域网 (WAN) 到达托管运行 5G NF 和应用程序的数据中心 (DC) 的云 WAN。然而，跨两个广域网实现 5G 流量的端到端 (E2E) 性能非常困难。将 5G 流放置在具有不同性能和可靠性特征、边缘和 DC 资源限制以及来自其他流的干扰的两个 WAN 上是不同的，并且比单 WAN 流量工程更具挑战性。我们解决了这一挑战，并表明，跨多 WAN 覆盖编排 E2E 路径使我们能够平均提高 13% 的吞吐量、减少 15% 的 RTT、减少 45% 的抖动，或将平均损耗从 0.06% 降低到 0.001% 以下。我们在可扩展的优化原型中实现了多 WAN 5G 流布局，该原型在网络上分配的字节数比贪婪基线多 26%–45%，同时还满足更多流的服务需求。

items.title: Smart Casual Verification of the Confidential Consortium Framework.
items.abstract: The Confidential Consortium Framework (CCF) is an open-source platform for developing trustworthy and reliable cloud applications. CCF powers Microsoft's Azure Confidential Ledger service and as such it is vital to build confidence in the correctness of CCF's design and implementation. This paper reports our experiences applying smart casual verification to validate the correctness of CCF's novel distributed protocols, focusing on its unique distributed consensus protocol and its custom client consistency model. We use the term smart casual verification to describe our hybrid approach, which combines the rigor of formal specification and model checking with the pragmatism of automated testing, in our case binding the formal specification in TLA+ to the C++ implementation. While traditional formal methods approaches require substantial buy-in and are often one-off efforts by domain experts, we have integrated our smart casual verification approach into CCF's CI pipeline, allowing contributors to continuously validate CCF as it evolves. We describe the challenges we faced in applying smart casual verification to a complex existing codebase and how we overcame them to find six subtle bugs in the design and implementation before they could impact production.
items.abstract_zh: 机密联盟框架 (CCF) 是一个用于开发值得信赖且可靠的云应用程序的开源平台。 CCF 为 Microsoft 的 Azure 机密账本服务提供支持，因此建立对 CCF 设计和实施正确性的信心至关重要。本文报告了我们应用智能休闲验证来验证 CCF 新颖的分布式协议的正确性的经验，重点关注其独特的分布式共识协议及其自定义客户端一致性模型。我们使用术语智能休闲验证来描述我们的混合方法，它将正式规范和模型检查的严格性与自动化测试的实用性结合起来，在我们的示例中，将 TLA+ 中的正式规范绑定到 C++ 实现。虽然传统的形式化方法需要大量的支持，并且通常是领域专家的一次性工作，但我们已将我们的智能休闲验证方法集成到 CCF 的 CI 管道中，允许贡献者在 CCF 的发展过程中不断验证它。我们描述了将智能休闲验证应用于复杂的现有代码库时所面临的挑战，以及我们如何克服这些挑战，在设计和实现中发现六个细微的错误，以免它们影响生产。

items.title: Ladder: A Convergence-based Structured DAG Blockchain for High Throughput and Low Latency.
items.abstract: Recent literature proposes the use of Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAG) to enhance blockchain performance. However, current block-DAG designs face three important limitations when fully utilizing parallel block processing: high computational overhead due to costly block sorting, complex transaction confirmation process, and vulnerability to balance attacks when determining the pivot chain. To this end, we propose Ladder, a structured twin-chain DAG blockchain with a convergence mechanism that efficiently optimizes parallel block processing strategy and enhances overall performance and security. In each round, a designated convergence node generates a lower-chain block, sorting the forked blocks from the upper-chain, reducing computational overhead and simplifying transaction confirmation.To counter potential adversarial disruptions, a dynamic committee is selected to generate special blocks when faulty blocks are detected. We implemented and evaluated Ladder in a distributed network environment against several state-of-the-art methods. Our results show that Ladder achieves a 59.6% increase in throughput and a 20.9% reduction in latency.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的文献提出使用有向无环图（DAG）来增强区块链性能。然而，当前的区块 DAG 设计在充分利用并行区块处理时面临三个重要限制：昂贵的区块排序导致的高计算开销、复杂的交易确认过程以及确定主链时容易受到平衡攻击的影响。为此，我们提出了Ladder，一种具有收敛机制的结构化双链DAG区块链，可以有效优化并行块处理策略并增强整体性能和安全性。在每一轮中，指定的汇聚节点生成一个下链区块，对来自上链的分叉区块进行排序，减少计算开销并简化交易确认。为了应对潜在的对抗性干扰，当检测到故障区块时，选择一个动态委员会来生成特殊区块。我们在分布式网络环境中针对几种最先进的方法实现并评估了 Ladder。我们的结果表明，Ladder 的吞吐量提高了 59.6%，延迟降低了 20.9%。

items.title: MTP: Transport for In-Network Computing.
items.abstract: In-network computing (INC) is being increasingly adopted to accelerate applications by offloading part of the applications’ computation to network devices. Such application-specific (L7) offloads have several attributes that the transport protocol must work with — they may mutate, intercept, reorder and delay application messages that span multiple packets. At the same time the transport must also work with the buffering and computation constraints of network devices hosting the L7 offloads. Existing transports and alternative approaches fall short in these regards. Therefore, we present MTP, the first transport to natively support INC. MTP is built around two major components: 1) a novel message-oriented reliability protocol and 2) a resource-specific congestion control framework. We implement a full-fledged prototype of MTP based on DPDK. We show the efficacy of MTP in a testbed with a real INC application as well as with comprehensive microbenchmarks and large-scale simulations.
items.abstract_zh: 网络内计算（INC）越来越多地被采用，通过将部分应用程序的计算卸载到网络设备来加速应用程序。这种特定于应用程序的 (L7) 卸载具有传输协议必须使用的多个属性 - 它们可能会改变、拦截、重新排序和延迟跨越多个数据包的应用程序消息。同时，传输还必须适应托管 L7 卸载的网络设备的缓冲和计算限制。现有的运输和替代方法在这些方面都存在不足。因此，我们提出了 MTP，这是第一个原生支持 INC 的传输。MTP 围绕两个主要组件构建：1) 新颖的面向消息的可靠性协议和 2) 特定于资源的拥塞控制框架。我们基于 DPDK 实现了成熟的 MTP 原型。我们通过真实的 INC 应用以及全面的微基准测试和大规模模拟，在测试台中展示了 MTP 的功效。

items.title: Building an Elastic Block Storage over EBOFs Using Shadow Views.
items.abstract: The EBOF (Ethernet-Bunch-Of-Flash) has emerged as an enticing and promising disaggregated storage platform due to its streamlined I/O processing, high scalability, and substantial energy/cost-efficiency improvement. An EBOF applies a smart-sender dumb-receiver design philosophy and provides backward-compatible storage volumes to expedite system deployment. Yet, the static and opaque internal I/O processing pipeline lacks resource allocation, I/O scheduling, and traffic orchestration capabilities, entailing bandwidth waste, workload non-adaptiveness, and performance interference. This paper presents the design and implementation of a distributed telemetry system (called shadow view) to tackle the above challenges and facilitate the effective use of an EBOF. We model an EBOF as a two-layer multi-switch architecture and develop a view development protocol to construct the EBOF running snapshot and expose internal execution statistics at runtime. Our design is motivated by the observation that fast data center networks make the overheads of inter-server communication and synchronization negligible. We demonstrate the effectiveness of shadow view by building a block storage (dubbed Flint) atop EBOFs. The enhanced I/O data plane allows us to develop new three techniques–an elastic volume manager, a view-enabled bandwidth auction mechanism, and an eIO scheduler. Our evaluations using the Fungible FS1600 EBOF show that a Flint volume achieves 9.3/9.2 GB/s read/write bandwidth with no latency degradation, significantly outperforming the defacto EBOF volume. It achieves up to 2.9× throughput improvements when running an object store. Flint is tenant-aware and remote target-aware, delivering efficient multi-tenancy and workload adaptiveness.
items.abstract_zh: EBOF（以太网闪存束）由于其简化的 I/O 处理、高可扩展性以及显着的能源/成本效率改进，已成为一种诱人且有前途的分类存储平台。 EBOF采用智能发送器哑接收器设计理念，并提供向后兼容的存储卷以加快系统部署。然而，静态且不透明的内部I/O处理管道缺乏资源分配、I/O调度和流量编排能力，导致带宽浪费、工作负载不适应性和性能干扰。本文介绍了分布式遥测系统（称为影子视图）的设计和实现，以解决上述挑战并促进 EBOF 的有效使用。我们将 EBOF 建模为两层多交换机架构，并开发视图开发协议来构建 EBOF 运行快照并在运行时公开内部执行统计信息。我们的设计动机是观察到快速的数据中心网络使服务器间通信和同步的开销可以忽略不计。我们通过在 EBOF 上构建块存储（称为 Flint）来演示影子视图的有效性。增强的 I/O 数据平面使我们能够开发三种新技术——弹性卷管理器、支持视图的带宽拍卖机制和 eIO 调度程序。我们使用 Fungible FS1600 EBOF 进行的评估表明，Flint 卷可实现 9.3/9.2 GB/s 读/写带宽，并且没有延迟下降，明显优于实际的 EBOF 卷。运行对象存储时，它的吞吐量提高了 2.9 倍。 Flint 具有租户感知和远程目标感知能力，可提供高效的多租户和工作负载适应性。

items.title: Towards Energy Efficient 5G vRAN Servers.
items.abstract: We study the problem of improving energy efficiency in virtualized radio access network (vRAN) servers, focusing on CPUs. Two distinct characteristics of vRAN software—strict real-time sub-millisecond deadlines and its proprietary black-box nature—preclude the use of existing general-purpose CPU energy management techniques. This paper presents RENC, a system that saves energy by adjusting CPU frequency in response to sub-second variations in cellular workloads, using the following techniques. First, despite large fluctuations in vRAN CPU load at sub-ms timescales, RENC establishes safe low-load intervals, e.g., by coupling Media Access Control (MAC) layer rate limiting with CPU frequency changes. This prevents high traffic during low-power operation, which would otherwise cause deadline misses. Second, we design techniques to compute CPU frequencies that are safe for these low-load intervals, achieved by measuring the slack in vRAN threads' deadlines using Linux eBPF hooks, or minor binary rewriting of the vRAN software. Third, we demonstrate the need to handle CPU load spikes triggered by control operations, such as new users attaching to the network. Our evaluation in a state-of-the-art vRAN testbed shows that our techniques reduces a vRAN server's CPU power consumption by up to 45% (29% server-wide).
items.abstract_zh: 我们研究提高虚拟化无线接入网络 (vRAN) 服务器能源效率的问题，重点关注 CPU。 vRAN 软件的两个明显特征——严格的实时亚毫秒期限及其专有的黑盒性质——阻碍了现有通用 CPU 能源管理技术的使用。本文介绍了 RENC，这是一个通过调整 CPU 频率来响应蜂窝工作负载的亚秒级变化来节省能源的系统，使用以下技术。首先，尽管 vRAN CPU 负载在亚毫秒时间尺度上波动较大，但 RENC 仍建立了安全的低负载间隔，例如通过将媒体访问控制 (MAC) 层速率限制与 CPU 频率变化相结合。这可以防止低功耗操作期间出现高流量，否则会导致错过最后期限。其次，我们设计了计算在这些低负载间隔内安全的 CPU 频率的技术，这是通过使用 Linux eBPF 挂钩测量 vRAN 线程截止时间的裕度或对 vRAN 软件进行少量二进制重写来实现的。第三，我们演示了处理由控制操作触发的 CPU 负载峰值的需要，例如新用户连接到网络。我们在最先进的 vRAN 测试台中进行的评估表明，我们的技术可将 vRAN 服务器的 CPU 功耗降低高达 45%（服务器范围内为 29%）。

items.title: Understanding and Profiling NVMe-over-TCP Using ntprof.
items.abstract: NVMe-over-TCP (NVMe/TCP) is an emerging remote storage protocol, increasingly adopted in enterprises and clouds. It establishes a high-performance reliable data channel between clients and storage targets to deliver block I/Os. Understanding and analyzing the protocol execution details and how well storage workloads run atop are pivotal for system developers and infrastructure engineers. However, our community lacks such a profiling utility, whereas existing solutions are ad-hoc, tedious, and heuristic-driven. Realizing it is challenging due to the unpredictable I/O workload profile, intricate system layer interaction, and deep execution pipeline. This paper presents ntprof, a systematic, informative, and lightweight NVMe/TCP profiler. Our key idea is to view the NVMe/TCP storage substrate as a lossless switched network and apply network monitoring techniques. We model each on-path system module as a software switch, equip it with a programmable profiling agent on the data plane, and develop a proactive query interface for statistics collection and analysis. ntprof, comprising a kernel module and a user-space utility, allows developers to define various profiling tasks, incurs marginal overhead when co-locating with applications, and generates performance reports based on prescribed specifications. We build ntprof atop Linux kernel 5.15.143 and apply it in six cases, i.e., end-to-end latency breakdown, interference analysis, SW/HW bottleneck localization, and application performance diagnostic. ntprof is available at https://github.com/netlab-wisconsin/ntprof .
items.abstract_zh: NVMe-over-TCP (NVMe/TCP) 是一种新兴的远程存储协议，越来越多地在企业和云中采用。它在客户端和存储目标之间建立高性能可靠的数据通道以提供块 I/O。对于系统开发人员和基础设施工程师来说，理解和分析协议执行细节以及存储工作负载的运行情况至关重要。然而，我们的社区缺乏这样的分析实用程序，而现有的解决方案是临时的、乏味的和启发式驱动的。由于不可预测的 I/O 工作负载配置文件、复杂的系统层交互和深度执行管道，实现这一点具有挑战性。本文介绍了 ntprof，一个系统性、信息丰富且轻量级的 NVMe/TCP 分析器。我们的核心思想是将 NVMe/TCP 存储底层视为无损交换网络并应用网络监控技术。我们将每个路径系统模块建模为软件交换机，在数据平面上为其配备可编程分析代理，并开发用于统计收集和分析的主动查询接口。 ntprof 由内核模块和用户空间实用程序组成，允许开发人员定义各种分析任务，与应用程序共置时会产生边际开销，并根据规定的规范生成性能报告。我们在 Linux 内核 5.15.143 上构建 ntprof 并将其应用于六种情况，即端到端延迟分解、干扰分析、软件/硬件瓶颈定位和应用程序性能诊断。 ntprof 可从 https://github.com/netlab-wisconsin/ntprof 获取。

items.title: SuperServe: Fine-Grained Inference Serving for Unpredictable Workloads.
items.abstract: The increasing deployment of ML models on the critical path of production applications requires ML inference serving systems to serve these models under unpredictable and bursty request arrival rates. Serving many models under such conditions requires a careful balance between each application’s latency and accuracy requirements and the overall efficiency of utilization of scarce resources. Faced with this tension, state-of-the-art systems either choose a single model representing a static point in the latency-accuracy tradeoff space to serve all requests or incur latency target violations by loading specific models on the critical path of request serving. Our work instead resolves this tension through a resource-efficient serving of the entire range of models spanning the latency-accuracy tradeoff space. Our novel mechanism, SubNetAct, achieves this by carefully inserting specialized control-flow operators in pre-trained, weight-shared super-networks. These operators enable SubNetAct to dynamically route a request through the network to actuate a specific model that meets the request’s latency and accuracy target. Thus, SubNetAct can serve a vastly higher number of models than prior systems while requiring upto 2.6× lower memory. More crucially, SubNetAct’s near-instantaneous actuation of a wide-range of models unlocks the design space of fine-grained, reactive scheduling policies. We design one such extremely effective policy, SlackFit, and instantiate both SubNetAct and SlackFit in a real system, SuperServe. On real-world traces derived from a Microsoft workload, SuperServe achieves 4.67% higher accuracy for the same latency targets and 2.85× higher latency target attainment for the same accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型在生产应用程序的关键路径上的部署不断增加，需要机器学习推理服务系统在不可预测的突发请求到达率下为这些模型提供服务。在这种条件下为许多模型提供服务需要在每个应用程序的延迟和准确性要求以及稀缺资源利用的整体效率之间进行仔细的平衡。面对这种紧张局势，最先进的系统要么选择代表延迟精度权衡空间中静态点的单个模型来服务所有请求，要么通过在请求服务的关键路径上加载特定模型来导致延迟目标违规。相反，我们的工作通过对跨越延迟精度权衡空间的整个模型范围提供资源高效的服务来解决这种紧张关系。我们的新颖机制 SubNetAct 通过在预先训练的、权重共享的超级网络中仔细插入专门的控制流运算符来实现这一目标。这些运算符使 SubNetAct 能够通过网络动态路由请求，以启动满足请求的延迟和准确性目标的特定模型。因此，与之前的系统相比，SubNetAct 可以服务更多数量的模型，同时所需的内存最多可减少 2.6 倍。更重要的是，SubNetAct 对各种模型的近乎瞬时驱动开启了细粒度、反应式调度策略的设计空间。我们设计了这样一种极其有效的策略：SlackFit，并在真实的系统 SuperServe 中实例化 SubNetAct 和 SlackFit。在源自 Microsoft 工作负载的真实跟踪中，SuperServe 在相同延迟目标下的准确度提高了 4.67%，在相同准确度下，延迟目标达到了 2.85 倍。

items.title: Pushing the Limits of In-Network Caching for Key-Value Stores.
items.abstract: We present OrbitCache, a new in-network caching architecture that can cache variable-length items to balance a wide range of key-value workloads. Unlike existing works, OrbitCache does not cache hot items in the switch memory. Instead, we make hot items revisit the switch data plane continuously by exploiting packet recirculation. Our approach keeps cached key-value pairs in the switch data plane while freeing them from item size limitations caused by hardware constraints. We implement an OrbitCache prototype on an Intel Tofino switch. Our experimental results show that OrbitCache can balance highly skewed workloads and is robust to various system conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 OrbitCache，这是一种新的网络内缓存架构，可以缓存可变长度项目以平衡各种键值工作负载。与现有作品不同，OrbitCache 不会在交换机内存中缓存热门项目。相反，我们通过利用数据包再循环使热点项目不断地重新访问交换机数据平面。我们的方法将缓存的键值对保留在交换机数据平面中，同时使它们免受硬件限制引起的项目大小限制。我们在 Intel Tofino 交换机上实现了 OrbitCache 原型。我们的实验结果表明，OrbitCache 可以平衡高度倾斜的工作负载，并且对各种系统条件都具有鲁棒性。

items.title: Beehive: A Scalable Disaggregated Memory Runtime Exploiting Asynchrony of Multithreaded Programs.
items.abstract: The Microsecond (µs)-scale I/O fabrics raise a tension between the programming productivity and performance, especially in disaggregated memory systems. The multithreaded synchronous programming model is popular in developing memory-disaggregated applications due to its intuitive program logic. However, our key insight is that although thread switching can effectively mitigate µs-scale latency, it leads to poor data locality and non-trivial scheduling overhead, leaving significant opportunities to improve the performance further. This paper proposes a memory-disaggregated framework, Beehive , which improves the remote access throughput by exploiting the asynchrony within each thread. To improve the programming usability, Beehive allows the programmers to develop applications in the conventional multithreaded synchronous model and automatically transforms the code into pararoutine (a newly proposed computation and scheduling unit) based asynchronous code via the Rust compiler. Beehive outperforms the state-of-the-art memory-disaggregated frameworks, i.e., Fastswap, Hermit, and AIFM, by 4.26×, 3.05×, and 1.58× on average.
items.abstract_zh: 微秒 (μs) 级 I/O 结构提高了编程效率和性能之间的矛盾，尤其是在分解内存系统中。多线程同步编程模型由于其直观的程序逻辑而在开发内存分解应用程序中很流行。然而，我们的主要见解是，虽然线程切换可以有效地减轻微秒级的延迟，但它会导致较差的数据局部性和不小的调度开销，从而为进一步提高性能留下了重要的机会。本文提出了一种内存分解框架 Beehive，它通过利用每个线程内的异步性来提高远程访问吞吐量。为了提高编程可用性，Beehive 允许程序员在传统的多线程同步模型中开发应用程序，并通过 Rust 编译器自动将代码转换为基于 pararoutine（新提出的计算和调度单元）的异步代码。 Beehive 的性能平均优于最先进的内存分解框架（即 Fastswap、Hermit 和 AIFM）4.26 倍、3.05 倍和 1.58 倍。

items.title: Dissecting and Streamlining the Interactive Loop of Mobile Cloud Gaming.
items.abstract: With cloud-side computing and rendering, mobile cloud gaming (MCG) is expected to deliver high-quality gaming experiences to budget mobile devices. However, our measurement on representative MCG platforms reveals that even under good network conditions, all platforms exhibit high interactive latency of 112–403 ms, from a user-input action to its display response, that critically affects users’ quality of experience. Moreover, jitters in network latency often lead to significant fluctuations in interactive latency. In this work, we collaborate with a commercial MCG platform to conduct the first in-depth analysis on the interactive latency of cloud gaming. We identify VSync, the synchronization primitive of Android graphics pipeline, to be a key contributor to the excessive interactive latency; as many as five VSync events are intricately invoked, which serialize the complex graphics processing logic on both the client and cloud sides. To address this, we design an end-to-end VSync regulator, dubbed LoopTailor, which minimizes VSync events by decoupling game rendering from the lengthy cloud-side graphics pipeline and coordinating cloud game rendering directly with the client. We implement LoopTailor on the collaborated platform and commodity Android devices, reducing the interactive latency (by ∼34%) to stably below 100 ms.
items.abstract_zh: 借助云端计算和渲染，移动云游戏（MCG）有望为廉价移动设备提供高质量的游戏体验。然而，我们对代表性MCG平台的测量表明，即使在良好的网络条件下，所有平台从用户输入操作到显示响应都表现出112-403毫秒的高交互延迟，这严重影响了用户的体验质量。此外，网络延迟的抖动通常会导致交互延迟的显着波动。在这项工作中，我们与商业MCG平台合作，首次对云游戏的交互延迟进行了深入分析。我们认为 VSync（Android 图形管道的同步原语）是导致交互延迟过大的关键因素；错综复杂地调用了多达5个VSync事件，将客户端和云端复杂的图形处理逻辑序列化。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个名为 LoopTailor 的端到端 VSync 调节器，它通过将游戏渲染与冗长的云端图形管道解耦并直接与客户端协调云游戏渲染来最大限度地减少 VSync 事件。我们在协作平台和商用 Android 设备上实施了 LoopTailor，将交互延迟（约 34%）降低到稳定在 100 毫秒以下。

items.title: NDD: A Decision Diagram for Network Verification.
items.abstract: State-of-the-art network verifiers extensively use Binary Decision Diagram (BDD) as the underlying data structure to represent the network state and equivalence classes. Despite its wide usage, we find BDD is not ideal for network verification: verifiers need to handle the low-level computation of equivalence classes, and still face scalability issues when the network state has a lot of bits. To this end, this paper introduces Network Decision Diagram (NDD), a new decision diagram customized for network verification. In a nutshell, NDD wraps BDD with another layers of decision diagram, such that each NDD node represents a field of the network, and each edge is labeled with a BDD encoding the values of that field. We designed and implemented a library for NDD, which features a native support for equivalence classes, and higher efficiency in memory and computation. Using the NDD library, we re-implemented five BDD-based verifiers with minor modifications to their original codes, and observed a 100× reduction in memory cost and 100× speedup. This indicates that NDD provides a drop-in replacement of BDD for network verifiers.
items.abstract_zh: 最先进的网络验证器广泛使用二元决策图（BDD）作为底层数据结构来表示网络状态和等价类。尽管 BDD 用途广泛，但我们发现它对于网络验证来说并不理想：验证者需要处理等价类的低级计算，并且当网络状态有很多位时仍然面临可扩展性问题。为此，本文介绍了网络决策图（NDD），一种为网络验证定制的新型决策图。简而言之，NDD 用另一层决策图包装了 BDD，使得每个 NDD 节点代表网络的一个字段，并且每条边都用编码该字段值的 BDD 进行标记。我们设计并实现了一个 NDD 库，它具有对等价类的原生支持，以及更高的内存和计算效率。使用 NDD 库，我们重新实现了五个基于 BDD 的验证器，对其原始代码进行了少量修改，并观察到内存成本降低了 100 倍，加速提高了 100 倍。这表明 NDD 为网络验证者提供了 BDD 的直接替代品。

items.title: PreAcher: Secure and Practical Password Pre-Authentication by Content Delivery Networks.
items.abstract: In today's Internet, websites widely rely on password authentication for user logins. However, the intensive computation required for password authentication exposes web servers to Application-layer DoS (ADoS) attacks that exploit the login interfaces. Existing solutions fail to simultaneously prevent such ADoS attacks, preserve password secrecy, and maintain good usability. In this paper, we present PreAcher, a system architecture that incorporates third-party Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) into the password authentication process and offloads the authentication workload to CDNs without divulging the passwords to them. At the core of PreAcher is a novel three-party authentication protocol that combines Oblivious Pseudorandom Function (OPRF) and Locality-Sensitive Hashing (LSH). This protocol allows CDNs to pre-authenticate users and thus filter out ADoS traffic without compromising password security. Our evaluations demonstrate that PreAcher significantly enhances the resilience of web servers against both ADoS attacks and preserves password security while introducing acceptable overheads. Notably, PreAcher can be deployed immediately by websites alone today, without modifications to client software or CDN infrastructure. We release the source code of PreAcher to facilitate its deployment and future research.
items.abstract_zh: 在当今的互联网中，网站广泛依赖密码身份验证来进行用户登录。然而，密码身份验证所需的密集计算使 Web 服务器面临利用登录界面的应用程序层 DoS (ADoS) 攻击。现有的解决方案无法同时防止此类 ADoS 攻击、保护密码保密性并保持良好的可用性。在本文中，我们提出了 PreAcher，这是一种系统架构，它将第三方内容交付网络 (CDN) 纳入密码身份验证过程，并将身份验证工作负载卸载到 CDN，而无需向其泄露密码。 PreAcher 的核心是一种新颖的三方身份验证协议，它结合了 Oblivious 伪随机函数 (OPRF) 和局部敏感哈希 (LSH)。该协议允许 CDN 预先验证用户身份，从而在不影响密码安全的情况下过滤掉 ADoS 流量。我们的评估表明，PreAcher 显着增强了 Web 服务器抵御 ADoS 攻击的能力，并在引入可接受的开销的同时保持了密码安全。值得注意的是，PreAcher 现在可以仅由网站立即部署，无需修改客户端软件或 CDN 基础设施。我们发布了 PreAcher 的源代码，以方便其部署和未来的研究。

items.title: Enabling Portable and High-Performance SmartNIC Programs with Alkali.
items.abstract: Trends indicate that emerging SmartNICs, either from different vendors or generations from the same vendor, exhibit substantial differences in hardware parallelism and memory interconnects. These variations make porting programs across NICs highly complex and time-consuming, requiring programmers to significantly refactor code for performance based on each target NIC’s hardware characteristics. We argue that an ideal SmartNIC compilation framework should allow developers to write target-independent programs, with the compiler automatically managing cross-NIC porting and performance optimization. We present such a framework, Alkali, that achieves this by (1) proposing a new intermediate representation for building flexible compiler infrastructure for multiple NIC targets and (2) developing a new iterative parallelism optimization algorithm that automatically ports and parallelizes the input programs based on the target NIC’s hardware characteristics. Experiments across a wide range of NIC applications demonstrate that Alkali enables developers to easily write portable, high-performance NIC programs. Our compiler optimization passes can automatically port these programs and make them run efficiently across all targets, achieving performance within 9.8% of hand-tuned expert implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 趋势表明，新兴的 SmartNIC，无论是来自不同供应商还是来自同一供应商的各代产品，在硬件并行性和内存互连方面都表现出巨大差异。这些变化使得跨 NIC 的移植程序变得非常复杂且耗时，要求程序员根据每个目标 NIC 的硬件特性显着重构代码以提高性能。我们认为，理想的 SmartNIC 编译框架应该允许开发人员编写与目标无关的程序，并且编译器自动管理跨 NIC 移植和性能优化。我们提出了这样一个框架 Alkali，它通过以下方式实现这一目标：(1) 提出一种新的中间表示形式，用于为多个 NIC 目标构建灵活的编译器基础设施；(2) 开发一种新的迭代并行优化算法，根据目标 NIC 的硬件特性自动移植和并行化输入程序。各种 NIC 应用的实验表明，Alkali 使开发人员能够轻松编写可移植、高性能的 NIC 程序。我们的编译器优化过程可以自动移植这些程序，并使它们在所有目标上高效运行，实现的性能比手动调整的专家实现低 9.8%。

items.title: ONCache: A Cache-Based Low-Overhead Container Overlay Network.
items.abstract: Recent years have witnessed a widespread adoption of containers. While containers simplify and accelerate application development, existing container network technologies either incur significant overhead, which hurts performance for distributed applications, or lose flexibility or compatibility, which hinders the widespread deployment in production. We carefully analyze the kernel data path of an overlay network, quantifying the time consumed by each segment of the data path and identifying the extra overhead in an overlay network compared to bare metal. We observe that this extra overhead generates repetitive results among packets, which inspires us to introduce caches within an overlay network. We design and implement ONCache ( O verlay N etwork Cache ), a cache-based container overlay network, to eliminate the extra overhead while maintaining flexibility and compatibility. We implement ONCache using the extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF) with only 524 lines of code, and integrate it as a plugin of Antrea. With ONCache, containers attain networking performance akin to that of bare metal. Compared to the standard overlay networks, ONCache improves throughput and request-response transaction rate by 12% and 36% for TCP (20% and 34% for UDP), respectively, while significantly reducing per-packet CPU overhead. Popular distributed applications also benefit from ONCache.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，容器得到广泛采用。虽然容器简化并加速了应用程序开发，但现有的容器网络技术要么会产生大量开销，从而损害分布式应用程序的性能，要么会失去灵活性或兼容性，从而阻碍生产中的广泛部署。我们仔细分析了覆盖网络的内核数据路径，量化了数据路径每段所消耗的时间，并确定了覆盖网络与裸机相比的额外开销。我们观察到这种额外的开销会在数据包之间产生重复的结果，这激励我们在覆盖网络中引入缓存。我们设计并实现了ONCache（Overlay Network Cache），一种基于缓存的容器覆盖网络，以消除额外的开销，同时保持灵活性和兼容性。我们使用扩展的伯克利数据包过滤器（eBPF）实现ONCache，仅用524行代码，并将其集成为Antrea的插件。借助 ONCache，容器可以获得与裸机类似的网络性能。与标准覆盖网络相比，ONCache 将 TCP 的吞吐量和请求响应事务率分别提高了 12% 和 36%（UDP 分别提高了 20% 和 34%），同时显着降低了每个数据包的 CPU 开销。流行的分布式应用程序也受益于 ONCache。

items.title: CEGS: Configuration Example Generalizing Synthesizer.
items.abstract: Network configuration synthesis promises to increase the efficiency of network management by reducing human involvement. However, despite significant advances in this field, existing synthesizers still require much human effort in drafting configuration templates or coding in a domain-specific language. We argue that the main reason for this is that a core capability is missing for current synthesizers: identifying and following configuration examples in configuration manuals and generalizing them to arbitrary topologies. In this work, we fill this capability gap with two recent advancements in artificial intelligence: graph neural networks (GNNs) and large language models (LLMs). We build CEGS, which can automatically identify appropriate configuration examples, follow and generalize them to fit target network scenarios. CEGS features a GNN-based Querier to identify relevant examples from device documentations, a GNN-based Classifier to generalize the example to arbitrary topology, and an efficient LLM-driven synthesis method to quickly and correctly synthesize configurations that comply with the intents. Evaluations of real-world networks and complex intents show that CEGS can automatically synthesize correct configurations for a network of 1094 devices without human involvement. In contrast, the state-of-the-art LLM-based synthesizer are more than 30 times slower than CEGS on average, even when human experts are in the loop.
items.abstract_zh: 网络配置综合有望通过减少人工参与来提高网络管理的效率。然而，尽管该领域取得了重大进展，现有的合成器仍然需要大量的人力来起草配置模板或使用特定于领域的语言进行编码。我们认为，造成这种情况的主要原因是当前合成器缺少核心功能：识别并遵循配置手册中的配置示例，并将它们推广到任意拓扑。在这项工作中，我们通过人工智能的两项最新进展填补了这一能力差距：图神经网络（GNN）和大型语言模型（LLM）。我们构建了 CEGS，它可以自动识别适当的配置示例，遵循并概括它们以适应目标网络场景。 CEGS 具有基于 GNN 的查询器，用于从设备文档中识别相关示例；基于 GNN 的分类器，用于将示例推广到任意拓扑；以及高效的 LLM 驱动的合成方法，用于快速、正确地合成符合意图的配置。对现实世界网络和复杂意图的评估表明，CEGS 可以自动为包含 1094 个设备的网络合成正确的配置，而无需人工参与。相比之下，最先进的基于 LLM 的合成器平均比 CEGS 慢 30 倍以上，即使是在人类专家参与的情况下也是如此。

items.title: Unlocking ECMP Programmability for Precise Traffic Control.
items.abstract: ECMP (equal-cost multi-path) has become a fundamental mechanism in data centers, which distributes flows along multiple equivalent paths based on their hash values. Randomized distribution optimizes for the aggregate case, spreading load across flows over time. However, there exists a class of important Precise Traffic Control (PTC) tasks that are at odds with ECMP randomness. For instance, if an end host perceives that its flows are traversing a problematic switch/link, it often needs to change their paths before a fix can be rolled out. With randomized hashing, existing solutions resort to modifying flow tuples; since hashing mechanisms are unknown and they vary across switches/vendors, it may take many trials before yielding a new path. Many other similar cases exist where precise and timely response is critical to the network. We propose programmable ECMP (P-ECMP), a programming model, compiler, and runtime that provides precise traffic control. P-ECMP leverages an oft-ignored feature, ECMP groups, which allows for a constrained set of capabilities that are nonetheless sufficiently expressive for our tasks. An operator supplies high-level descriptions of their topology and policies, and our compiler generates PTC configurations for each switch. End hosts can reconfigure specific flows to use different PTC policies precisely and quickly, addressing a range of important use cases. We have evaluated P-ECMP using simulation at scale, and deployed one use case to a real-world data center that serves live user traffic.
items.abstract_zh: ECMP（等价多路径）已成为数据中心的基本机制，它根据哈希值沿多个等效路径分配流量。随机分布针对聚合情况进行优化，随着时间的推移将负载分散到各个流中。然而，有一类重要的精确流量控制 (PTC) 任务与 ECMP 随机性不一致。例如，如果终端主机发现其流量正在穿越有问题的交换机/链路，则通常需要更改其路径，然后才能推出修复程序。通过随机散列，现有的解决方案诉诸于修改流元组；由于哈希机制是未知的，并且它们因交换机/供应商而异，因此在产生新路径之前可能需要进行多次试验。存在许多其他类似的情况，其中精确和及时的响应对于网络至关重要。我们提出了可编程 ECMP (P-ECMP)，这是一种提供精确流量控制的编程模型、编译器和运行时。 P-ECMP 利用了一个经常被忽视的功能，即 ECMP 组，它允许一组受限的功能，但仍足以满足我们的任务。运营商提供其拓扑和策略的高级描述，我们的编译器为每个交换机生成 PTC 配置。终端主机可以重新配置特定流，以准确、快速地使用不同的 PTC 策略，从而解决一系列重要的用例。我们使用大规模模拟评估了 P-ECMP，并将一个用例部署到为实时用户流量提供服务的真实数据中心。

items.title: Pyrrha: Congestion-Root-Based Flow Control to Eliminate Head-of-Line Blocking in Datacenter.
items.abstract: In modern datacenters, the effectiveness of end-to-end congestion control (CC) is quickly diminishing with the rapid bandwidth evolution. Per-hop flow control (FC) can react to congestion more promptly. However, a coarse-grained FC can result in Head-Of-Line (HOL) blocking. A fine-grained, per-flow FC can eliminate HOL blocking caused by flow control, however, it does not scale well. This paper presents Pyrrha, a scalable flow control approach that provably eliminates HOL blocking while using a minimum number of queues. In Pyrrha, flow control first takes effect on the root of the congestion, i.e., the port where congestion occurs. And then flows are controlled according to their contributed congestion roots. A prototype of Pyrrha is implemented on Tofino2 switches. Compared with state-of-the-art approaches, the average FCT of uncongested flows is reduced by 42%-98%, and 99th-tail latency can be 1.6×-215× lower, without compromising the performance of congested flows.
items.abstract_zh: 在现代数据中心中，端到端拥塞控制 (CC) 的有效性随着带宽的快速发展而迅速减弱。每跳流量控制 (FC) 可以更迅速地对拥塞做出反应。然而，粗粒度 FC 可能会导致队头 (HOL) 阻塞。细粒度的、按流的 FC 可以消除由流控制引起的 HOL 阻塞，但是它的扩展性不佳。本文介绍了 Pyrrha，这是一种可扩展的流量控制方法，可在使用最少数量的队列的同时消除 HOL 阻塞。在Pyratha中，流量控制首先对拥塞的根源起作用，即发生拥塞的端口。然后根据其贡献的拥塞根源来控制流量。 Pyratha 的原型是在 Tofino2 交换机上实现的。与最先进的方法相比，非拥塞流的平均 FCT 降低了 42%-98%，第 99 尾延迟可降低 1.6×-215×，而不会影响拥塞流的性能。

items.title: One-Size-Fits-None: Understanding and Enhancing Slow-Fault Tolerance in Modern Distributed Systems.
items.abstract: Recent studies have shown that various hardware components exhibit fail-slow behavior at scale. However, the characteristics of distributed software's tolerance of such slow faults remain ill-understood. This paper presents a comprehensive study that investigates the characteristics and current practices of slow-fault tolerance in modern distributed software. We focus on the fundamentally nuanced nature of slow faults. We develop a testing pipeline to systematically introduce diverse slow faults, measure their impact under different workloads, and identify the patterns. Our study shows that even small changes can lead to dramatically different reactions. While some systems have added slow-fault handling mechanisms, they are mostly controlled by static thresholds, which can hardly accommodate the highly sensitive and dynamic characteristics.
