To address this gap, we design ADR, a lightweight library to use within system code and make fail-slow handling adaptive. Evaluation shows ADR significantly reduces the impact of slow faults.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，各种硬件组件大规模地表现出故障缓慢行为。然而，分布式软件对这种缓慢故障的容忍特性仍然不为人所知。本文提出了一项全面的研究，调查现代分布式软件中慢容错的特征和当前实践。我们关注慢故障的根本细微差别。我们开发了一个测试管道来系统地引入各种慢故障，测量它们在不同工作负载下的影响，并识别模式。我们的研究表明，即使很小的变化也会导致截然不同的反应。虽然有些系统增加了慢故障处理机制，但大多采用静态阈值控制，很难适应高敏感和动态的特性。为了弥补这一差距，我们设计了 ADR，这是一个在系统代码中使用的轻量级库，并使慢速故障处理具有适应性。评估表明，ADR 显着降低了慢故障的影响。

items.title: Securing Public Cloud Networks with Efficient Role-based Micro-Segmentation.
items.abstract: Securing network traffic within data centers is a critical and daunting challenge due to the increasing complexity and scale of modern public clouds. Micro-segmentation offers a promising solution by implementing fine-grained, workload-specific network security policies to mitigate potential attacks. However, the dynamic nature and large scale of deployments present significant obstacles in crafting precise security policies, limiting the practicality of this approach. To address these challenges, we introduce a novel system that efficiently processes vast volumes of network-flow logs and effectively infers the roles of network endpoints. Our method integrates domain knowledge and communication patterns in a principled manner, facilitating the creation of micro-segmentation policies at a large scale. Evaluations with real-world deployment demonstrate that our solution significantly surpasses existing algorithms in role inference accuracy. We implement our solution as an end-to-end system, and we show that our system is up to 21.5× more cost-efficient than Apache Flink, a widely used open-source stream processing system.
items.abstract_zh: 由于现代公共云的复杂性和规模不断增加，保护数据中心内的网络流量是一项至关重要且艰巨的挑战。微分段通过实施细粒度、特定于工作负载的网络安全策略来减轻潜在的攻击，提供了一种有前途的解决方案。然而，部署的动态性和大规模给制定精确的安全策略带来了重大障碍，限制了这种方法的实用性。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的系统，该系统可以有效处理大量网络流日志并有效推断网络端点的角色。我们的方法以原则性的方式集成了领域知识和通信模式，有助于大规模创建微细分策略。实际部署的评估表明，我们的解决方案在角色推断准确性方面显着超越现有算法。我们将我们的解决方案实现为端到端系统，并证明我们的系统比广泛使用的开源流处理系统 Apache Flink 的成本效率高出 21.5 倍。

items.title: AsTree: An Audio Subscription Architecture Enabling Massive-Scale Multi-Party Conferencing.
items.abstract: While operating a multi-party video conferencing system (Lark) globally, we find that audio subscription alone may pose considerable challenges to the network, especially when scaling towards massive scales. Traditional strategy of subscribing to all remote participants suffers from issues such as signaling storm, excessive bandwidth and resource consumption on both server and client sides. Aimed at enhanced scalability, we share our design of AsTree, an audio subscription architecture. By a cascading tree topology and media plane-based audio selection, AsTree dramatically reduces the number of signaling messages and audio streams to forward. Practical deployment in Lark reduces audio and video stall ratios by more than 30% and 50%. We also receive 40% less negative client reviews, strongly proving the value of AsTree.
items.abstract_zh: 在全球范围内运营多方视频会议系统（Lark）时，我们发现仅音频订阅就可能对网络构成相当大的挑战，尤其是在大规模扩展时。传统的订阅所有远程参与者的策略存在信令风暴、服务器和客户端带宽过多以及资源消耗等问题。为了增强可扩展性，我们分享了 AsTree（音频订阅架构）的设计。通过级联树形拓扑和基于媒体平面的音频选择，AsTree 极大地减少了要转发的信令消息和音频流的数量。 Practical deployment in Lark reduces audio and video stall ratios by more than 30% and 50%.我们收到的负面客户评论也减少了 40%，有力地证明了 AsTree 的价值。

items.title: Enhancing Network Failure Mitigation with Performance-Aware Ranking.
items.abstract: Cloud providers install mitigations to reduce the impact of network failures within their datacenters. Existing network mitigation systems rely on simple local criteria or global proxy metrics to determine the best action. In this paper, we show that we can support a broader range of actions and select more effective mitigations by directly optimizing end-to-end flow-level metrics and analyzing actions holistically. To achieve this, we develop novel techniques to quickly estimate the impact of different mitigations and rank them with high fidelity. Our results on incidents from a large cloud provider show orders of magnitude improvements in flow completion time and throughput. We also show our approach scales to large datacenters.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商安装缓解措施以减少其数据中心内网络故障的影响。现有的网络缓解系统依靠简单的本地标准或全局代理指标来确定最佳操作。在本文中，我们表明，通过直接优化端到端流量级别指标并整体分析操作，我们可以支持更广泛的操作并选择更有效的缓解措施。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了新颖的技术来快速估计不同缓解措施的影响，并以高保真度对其进行排名。我们对大型云提供商的事件的结果显示，流程完成时间和吞吐量有了数量级的改进。我们还展示了我们的方法适用于大型数据中心。

items.title: From Address Blocks to Authorized Prefixes: Redesigning RPKI ROV with a Hierarchical Hashing Scheme for Fast and Memory-Efficient Validation.
items.abstract: Route Origin Validation (ROV) with Route Origin Authorizations (ROAs), built on top of the Resource Public Key Infrastructure (RPKI), serves as the only formally standardized and production-grade defense mechanism against route hijackings in global interdomain routing infrastructures. However, the widespread adoption of RPKI has introduced escalating scalability challenges in validating high volumes of route messages against massive ROA entries. In this paper, we attribute the performance bottleneck of existing ROV schemes to their underlying validation model, where the route is matched against rules in the form of address blocks. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose the Authorized Prefix (AP) model that enables validation at the prefix granularity, and redesign RPKI ROV based on this new model with a hierarchical hashing scheme named h 2 ROV . Extensive evaluations verify h 2 ROV 's superiority over state-of-the-art approaches in IPv4, with a speedup of $1.7× ∼ 9.8× in validation and a reduction of 49.3% ∼ 86.6% in memory consumption. System emulations using real-world network topologies further demonstrate h 2 ROV confines its impact to routing convergence to below 8.5% during update burst events, while reducing ROV-induced delays by 30.4% ∼ 64.7% compared to existing solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 具有路由源授权 (ROA) 的路由源验证 (ROV) 建立在资源公钥基础设施 (RPKI) 之上，是全球域间路由基础设施中针对路由劫持的唯一正式标准化和生产级防御机制。然而，RPKI 的广泛采用在根据大量 ROA 条目验证大量路由消息时带来了不断升级的可扩展性挑战。在本文中，我们将现有 ROV 方案的性能瓶颈归因于其底层验证模型，其中路由与地址块形式的规则进行匹配。为了克服这个瓶颈，我们提出了授权前缀（AP）模型，可以在前缀粒度上进行验证，并基于这个新模型重新设计 RPKI ROV，采用名为 h 2 ROV 的分层哈希方案。广泛的评估验证了 h 2 ROV 相对于 IPv4 中最先进的方法的优越性，验证速度提高了 1.7× ∼ 9.8× 美元，内存消耗减少了 49.3% ∼ 86.6%。使用真实网络拓扑的系统仿真进一步证明，h 2 ROV 在更新突发事件期间将其对路由收敛的影响限制在 8.5% 以下，同时与现有解决方案相比，将 ROV 引起的延迟减少了 30.4% ∼ 64.7%。

items.title: Mutant: Learning Congestion Control from Existing Protocols via Online Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Learning how to control congestion remains a challenge despite years of progress. Existing congestion control protocols have demonstrated efficacy within specific network conditions, inevitably behaving suboptimally or poorly in others. Machine learning solutions to congestion control have been proposed, though relying on extensive training and specific network configurations. In this paper, we loosen such dependencies by proposing Mutant, an online reinforcement learning algorithm for congestion control that adapts to the behavior of the best-performing schemes, outperforming them in most network conditions. Design challenges included determining the best protocols to learn from, given a network scenario, and creating a system able to evolve to accommodate future protocols with minimal changes. Our evaluation on real-world and emulated scenarios shows that Mutant achieves lower delays and higher throughput than prior learning-based schemes while maintaining fairness by exhibiting negligible harm to competing flows, making it robust across diverse and dynamic network conditions.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管取得了多年的进展，学习如何控制拥堵仍然是一个挑战。现有的拥塞控制协议已在特定网络条件下表现出有效性，但在其他条件下不可避免地表现不佳或较差。尽管依赖于广泛的训练和特定的网络配置，但已经提出了拥塞控制的机器学习解决方案。在本文中，我们通过提出 Mutant 来放松这种依赖关系，Mutant 是一种用于拥塞控制的在线强化学习算法，它适应性能最佳方案的行为，在大多数网络条件下表现优于它们。设计挑战包括在给定的网络场景下确定最佳的学习协议，以及创建一个能够以最小的变化不断发展以适应未来协议的系统。我们对现实世界和模拟场景的评估表明，与之前基于学习的方案相比，Mutant 实现了更低的延迟和更高的吞吐量，同时通过对竞争流的损害可以忽略不计来保持公平性，使其在多样化和动态的网络条件下保持稳健。

items.title: SIRD: A Sender-Informed, Receiver-Driven Datacenter Transport Protocol.
items.abstract: Datacenter congestion control protocols are challenged to navigate the throughput-buffering trade-off while relative packet buffer capacity is trending lower year-over-year. In this context, receiver-driven protocols — which schedule packet transmissions instead of reacting to congestion — excel when the bottleneck lies at the ToR-to-receiver link. However, when multiple receivers must use a shared link (e.g., ToR to Spine), their independent schedules can conflict. We present SIRD, a receiver-driven congestion control protocol designed around the simple insight that single-owner links should be scheduled, while shared links should be managed with reactive control algorithms. The approach allows receivers to both precisely schedule their downlinks and to coordinate over shared bottlenecks. Critically, SIRD also treats sender uplinks as shared links, enabling the flow of congestion feedback from senders to receivers, which then adapt their scheduling to each sender’s real time capacity. This results in tight scheduling, enabling high bandwidth utilization with little contention, and thus minimal latency-inducing buffering in the fabric. We implement SIRD on top of the Caladan stack and show that SIRD’s asymmetric design can deliver 100Gbps in software while keeping network queuing minimal. We further compare SIRD to state-of-the-art receiver-driven protocols (Homa, dcPIM, and ExpressPass) and production-grade reactive protocols (Swift and DCTCP) and show that SIRD is uniquely able to simultaneously maximize link utilization, minimize queuing, and obtain near-optimal latency.
items.abstract_zh: 数据中心拥塞控制协议面临着处理吞吐量缓冲权衡的挑战，而相对数据包缓冲容量则逐年下降。在这种情况下，当瓶颈位于 ToR 到接收器的链路时，接收器驱动的协议（调度数据包传输而不是对拥塞做出反应）表现出色。然而，当多个接收器必须使用共享链路（例如，ToR 到 Spine）时，它们的独立调度可能会发生冲突。我们提出了 SIRD，这是一种接收器驱动的拥塞控制协议，其设计围绕这样一个简单的见解：应调度单所有者链路，而应使用反应控制算法来管理共享链路。该方法允许接收器精确调度其下行链路并协调共享瓶颈。至关重要的是，SIRD 还将发送方上行链路视为共享链路，从而实现从发送方到接收方的拥塞反馈流，然后接收方根据每个发送方的实时容量调整其调度。这会导致严格的调度，从而实现高带宽利用率和很少的争用，从而最大限度地减少结构中引起延迟的缓冲。我们在 Caladan 堆栈之上实施 SIRD，并表明 SIRD 的非对称设计可以在软件中提供 100Gbps，同时保持网络队列最小化。我们进一步将 SIRD 与最先进的接收器驱动协议（Homa、dcPIM 和 ExpressPass）以及生产级反应式协议（Swift 和 DCTCP）进行比较，并表明 SIRD 能够同时最大化链路利用率、最小化排队并获得接近最优的延迟。

items.title: A Layered Formal Methods Approach to Answering Queue-related Queries.
items.abstract: Queue dynamics introduce significant uncertainty in network management tasks such as debugging, performance monitoring, and analysis. Despite numerous queue-monitoring techniques, many networks today continue to collect only per-port packet counts (e.g., using SNMP). Although queue lengths are correlated with packet counts, deriving the precise correlation between them is very challenging since packet counts do not specify many quantities (e.g., packet arrival order) which affect queue lengths. This paper presents QuASI, a system that can answer many queue-related queries using only coarse-grained per-port packet counts. QuASI checks whether there exists a packet trace that is consistent with the packet counts and satisfies a query. To scale on large problem instances, QuASI relies on a layered approach and on a novel enqueue-rate abstraction, which is lossless for the class of queries that QuASI answers. The first layer employs a novel and efficient algorithm that generates a cover-set of abstract traces, constructs representative abstract traces from the cover-set, and efficiently checks each representative abstract trace by leveraging a known result on (0,1)-matrix existence. The first layer guarantees no false negatives: if the first layer says "No", there is no packet trace consistent with the observed packet counts that makes the query true. If it says "Yes", further verification is needed, which the second layer resolves using an SMT solver. As a result, QuASI has no false positives and no false negatives. Our evaluations show that QuASI is up to 10 6 X faster than state-of-the-art, and can answer non-trivial queries about queue metrics (e.g., queue length) using minute-granularity packet counts. Our work is the first step toward more practical formal performance analysis under given measurements.
items.abstract_zh: 队列动态给调试、性能监控和分析等网络管理任务带来了显着的不确定性。尽管有许多队列监控技术，但当今许多网络仍然只收集每个端口的数据包计数（例如，使用 SNMP）。尽管队列长度与数据包计数相关，但导出它们之间的精确相关性非常具有挑战性，因为数据包计数没有指定影响队列长度的许多数量（例如数据包到达顺序）。本文介绍了 QuASI，这是一个仅使用粗粒度的每端口数据包计数即可回答许多与队列相关的查询的系统。 QuASI 检查是否存在与数据包计数一致并满足查询的数据包跟踪。为了扩展大型问题实例，QuASI 依赖于分层方法和新颖的排队速率抽象，这对于 QuASI 回答的查询类别是无损的。第一层采用新颖且高效的算法，生成抽象迹线的覆盖集，从覆盖集构造代表性抽象迹线，并通过利用（0,1）矩阵存在性的已知结果来有效地检查每个代表性抽象迹线。第一层保证没有漏报：如果第一层说“否”，则不存在与观察到的数据包计数一致的数据包跟踪，从而使查询为真。如果显示“是”，则需要进一步验证，第二层使用 SMT 求解器进行解析。因此，QuASI 没有误报，也没有漏报。我们的评估表明，QuASI 的速度比最先进的技术快 10 6 倍，并且可以使用分钟粒度数据包计数来回答有关队列指标（例如队列长度）的重要查询。我们的工作是在给定测量下进行更实用的正式性能分析​​的第一步。

items.title: Quicksand: Harnessing Stranded Datacenter Resources with Granular Computing.
items.abstract: Datacenters today waste CPU and memory, as resources demanded by applications often fail to match the resources available on machines. This leads to stranded resources because one resource that runs out prevents placing additional applications that could consume the other resources. Unusable stranded resources result in reduced utilization of servers, and wasted money and energy. Quicksand is a new framework and runtime system that unstrands resources by providing developers with familiar, high-level abstractions (e.g., data structures, batch computing). Internally Quicksand decomposes them into resource proclets, granular units that each primarily consume resources of one type. Inspired by recent granular programming models, Quicksand decouples consumption of resources as much as possible. It splits, merges, and migrates resource proclets in milliseconds, so it can use resources on any machine, even if available only briefly. Evaluation of our prototype with four applications shows that Quicksand uses stranded resources effectively; that Quicksand reacts to changing resource availability and demand within milliseconds, increasing utilization; and that porting applications to Quicksand requires moderate effort.
items.abstract_zh: 如今的数据中心浪费 CPU 和内存，因为应用程序所需的资源通常无法与计算机上的可用资源相匹配。这会导致资源搁浅，因为一种资源耗尽会阻止放置可能消耗其他资源的其他应用程序。无法使用的闲置资源会导致服务器利用率降低，并浪费金钱和能源。 Quicksand 是一种新的框架和运行时系统，它通过为开发人员提供熟悉的高级抽象（例如数据结构、批处理计算）来释放资源。在内部，Quicksand 将它们分解为资源过程，即每个主要消耗一种类型资源的粒度单元。受最新粒度编程模型的启发，Quicksand 尽可能地解耦资源消耗。它可以在几毫秒内分割、合并和迁移资源 proclet，因此它可以使用任何机器上的资源，即使只是短暂可用。通过四个应用程序对我们的原型进行的评估表明，Quicksand 可以有效地利用闲置资源； Quicksand 在几毫秒内对不断变化的资源可用性和需求做出反应，从而提高利用率；并且将应用程序移植到 Quicksand 需要付出一定的努力。

items.title: Verifying maximum link loads in a changing world.
items.abstract: To meet ever more stringent requirements, network operators often need to reason about worst-case link loads. Doing so involves analyzing traffic forwarding after failures and BGP route changes. State-of-the-art systems identify failure scenarios causing congestion, but they ignore route changes. We present Velo, the first verification system that efficiently finds maximum link loads under failures and route changes. The key building block of Velo is its ability to massively reduce the gigantic space of possible route changes thanks to (i) a router-based abstraction for route changes, (ii) a theoretical characterization of scenarios leading to worst-case link loads, and (iii) an approximation of input traffic matrices. We fully implement and extensively evaluate Velo. Velo takes only a few minutes to accurately compute all worst-case link loads in large ISP networks. It thus provides operators with critical support to robustify network configurations, improve network management and take business decisions.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足越来越严格的要求，网络运营商通常需要考虑最坏情况的链路负载。这样做涉及分析故障后的流量转发和 BGP 路由更改。最先进的系统可以识别导致拥塞的故障场景，但它们会忽略路线变化。我们推出了 Velo，这是第一个能够在故障和路由变化情况下有效找到最大链路负载的验证系统。 Velo 的关键构建模块是其能够大幅减少可能的路由更改的巨大空间，这要归功于 (i) 基于路由器的路由更改抽象，(ii) 导致最坏情况链路负载的场景的理论特征，以及 (iii) 输入流量矩阵的近似。我们全面实施并广泛评估 Velo。 Velo 只需几分钟即可准确计算大型 ISP 网络中所有最坏情况的链路负载。因此，它为运营商提供了关键支持，以增强网络配置、改进网络管理和制定业务决策。

items.title: GRANNY: Granular Management of Compute-Intensive Applications in the Cloud.
items.abstract: Parallel applications are typically implemented using multi-threading (with shared memory, e.g., OpenMP) or multi-processing (with message passing, e.g., MPI). While it seems attractive to deploy such applications in cloud VMs, existing cloud schedulers fail to manage these applications efficiently: they cannot scale multi-threaded applications dynamically when more vCPUs in a VM become available, and they cause fragmentation over time because of the static allocation of multi-process applications to VMs. We describe GRANNY, a new distributed runtime that enables the fine-granular management of multi-threaded/process applications in cloud environments. GRANNY supports the vertical scaling of multi-threaded applications within a VM and the horizontal migration of multi-process applications between VMs. GRANNY achieves both through a single WebAssembly-based execution abstraction: Granules can execute application code with thread or process semantics and allow for efficient snapshotting. GRANNY scales up applications by adding more Granules at runtime, and de-fragments applications by migrating Granules between VMs. In both cases, it launches new Granules from snapshots efficiently. We evaluate GRANNY with dynamic scheduling policies and show that, compared to current schedulers, it reduces the makespan for OpenMP workloads by up to 60% and the fragmentation for MPI workloads by up to 25%.
items.abstract_zh: 并行应用程序通常使用多线程（使用共享内存，例如 OpenMP）或多处理（使用消息传递，例如 MPI）来实现。虽然在云虚拟机中部署此类应用程序似乎很有吸引力，但现有的云调度程序无法有效地管理这些应用程序：当虚拟机中的更多 vCPU 可用时，它们无法动态扩展多线程应用程序，并且由于多进程应用程序静态分配给虚拟机，随着时间的推移，它们会导致碎片。我们描述了 GRANNY，一种新的分布式运行时，它可以在云环境中对多线程/进程应用程序进行细粒度管理。 GRANNY支持VM内多线程应用程序的垂直扩展以及VM之间多进程应用程序的水平迁移。 GRANNY 通过单个基于 WebAssembly 的执行抽象来实现这两个目标：Granules 可以使用线程或进程语义执行应用程序代码，并允许高效的快照。 GRANNY 通过在运行时添加更多 Granule 来扩展应用程序，并通过在虚拟机之间迁移 Granules 来整理应用程序碎片。在这两种情况下，它都能有效地从快照启动新的 Granules。我们使用动态调度策略对 GRANNY 进行评估，结果表明，与当前的调度程序相比，它可将 OpenMP 工作负载的完工时间减少高达 60%，将 MPI 工作负载的碎片减少高达 25%。

items.title: CellReplay: Towards accurate record-and-replay for cellular networks.
items.abstract: The inherent variability of real-world cellular networks makes it hard to evaluate, reproduce, and debug the performance of networked applications running on these networks. A common approach is to record and replay a trace of observed cellular network performance. However, we show that the state-of-the-art record-and-replay technique produces empirically inaccurate results that can cause evaluation bias. This paper presents the design and implementation of CellReplay, a tool that records the time-varying performance of a live cellular network into traces using preset workloads and faithfully replays the observed performance for other workloads through an emulated network interface. The key challenge in achieving high accuracy is to replay varying network behavior in a way that captures its sensitivity to the workload. CellReplay records network behavior under two predefined workloads simultaneously and interpolates upon replay for other workloads. Across various challenging network conditions, our evaluation shows that real-world networked applications (e.g., web browsing or video streaming) running on CellReplay achieve similar performance (e.g., page load time or bitrate selection) to their live network counterparts, with significantly reduced error compared to the prior method.
items.abstract_zh: 现实世界蜂窝网络固有的可变性使得评估、重现和调试在这些网络上运行的网络应用程序的性能变得困难。一种常见的方法是记录并重放观察到的蜂窝网络性能的痕迹。然而，我们表明，最先进的记录和重放技术会产生经验上不准确的结果，可能导致评估偏差。本文介绍了 CellReplay 的设计和实现，该工具使用预设工作负载将实时蜂窝网络随时间变化的性能记录到轨迹中，并通过模拟网络接口忠实地重播其他工作负载观察到的性能。实现高精度的关键挑战是以捕获其对工作负载敏感性的方式重放不同的网络行为。 CellReplay 同时记录两个预定义工作负载下的网络行为，并在重播时对其他工作负载进行插值。在各种具有挑战性的网络条件下，我们的评估表明，在 CellReplay 上运行的现实网络应用程序（例如网页浏览或视频流）可实现与其实时网络对应程序相似的性能（例如页面加载时间或比特率选择），并且与之前的方法相比，错误显着减少。

items.title: Self-Clocked Round-Robin Packet Scheduling.
items.abstract: Deficit Round Robin (DRR) is the de facto fair packet scheduler in the Internet due to its superior fairness and scalability. We show that DRR can perform poorly due to its assumptions about packet size distributions and traffic bursts. Concretely, DRR performs best if (1) packet size distributions are known in advance; its optimal performance depends on tuning a parameter based on the largest packet, and (2) all bursts are long and create backlogged queues. We show that neither of these assumptions holds in today's Internet: packet size distributions are varied and dynamic, complicating the tuning of DRR. Plus, Internet traffic consists of many short, latency-sensitive flows, creating small bursts. These flows can experience high latency under DRR as it serves a potentially large number of flows in a round-robin fashion. To address these shortcomings while retaining the fairness and scalability of DRR, we introduce Self-Clocked Round-Robin Scheduling (SCRR), a parameter-less, low-latency, and scalable packet scheduler that boosts short latency-sensitive flows through careful adjustments to their virtual times without violating their fair share guarantees. We evaluate SCRR using theoretical models and a Linux implementation on a physical testbed. Our results demonstrate that while performing on an equal footing with DRR on achieving flow fairness, SCRR reduces the average CPU overhead by 23% compared to DRR with a small quantum while improving the application latency by 71% compared to DRR with a large quantum.
items.abstract_zh: 赤字轮询（DRR）由于其卓越的公平性和可扩展性，成为互联网上事实上的公平数据包调度器。我们表明，由于 DRR 对数据包大小分布和流量突发的假设，它的性能可能很差。具体而言，如果 (1) 预先知道数据包大小分布，则 DRR 性能最佳；其最佳性能取决于根据最大数据包调整参数，并且（2）所有突发都很长并会产生积压队列。我们表明，这些假设在当今的互联网中都不成立：数据包大小分布是变化的且动态的，这使得 DRR 的调整变得复杂。此外，互联网流量由许多短的、延迟敏感的流组成，产生小突发。这些流在 DRR 下可能会经历高延迟，因为它以循环方式为潜在大量流提供服务。为了解决这些缺点，同时保留 DRR 的公平性和可扩展性，我们引入了自时钟循环调度 (SCRR)，这是一种无参数、低延迟且可扩展的数据包调度程序，可通过仔细调整虚拟时间来增强短延迟敏感流，而不会违反其公平份额保证。我们使用理论模型和物理测试台上的 Linux 实现来评估 SCRR。我们的结果表明，在实现流量公平性方面与 DRR 处于同等水平时，SCRR 与小量程的 DRR 相比，平均 CPU 开销降低了 23%，同时与大量程的 DRR 相比，应用程序延迟提高了 71%。

items.title: PAPAYA Federated Analytics Stack: Engineering Privacy, Scalability and Practicality.
items.abstract: Cross-device Federated Analytics (FA) is a distributed computation paradigm designed to answer analytics queries about and derive insights from data held locally on users’ devices. On-device computations combined with other privacy and security measures ensure that only minimal data is transmitted off-device, achieving a high standard of data protection. Despite FA’s broad adoption, the applicability of existing FA systems is limited by compromised accuracy; lack of flexibility for data analytics; and an inability to scale effectively. In this paper, we describe our approach to combine privacy, scalability, and practicality to build a system that overcomes these limitations. The PAPAYA system at Meta system leverages trusted execution environments (TEEs) and optimizes the use of on-device computing resources to facilitate federated data processing across large fleets of devices, while ensuring robust, defensible, and verifiable privacy safeguards. We focus on federated analytics (statistics and monitoring), in contrast to systems for federated learning (ML workloads), and we flag the key differences.
items.abstract_zh: 跨设备联合分析 (FA) 是一种分布式计算范例，旨在回答有关用户设备本地保存的数据的分析查询并从中获取见解。设备内计算与其他隐私和安全措施相结合，确保只有最少的数据在设备外传输，从而实现高标准的数据保护。尽管 FA 得到了广泛采用，但现有 FA 系统的适用性因准确性受损而受到限制；数据分析缺乏灵活性；以及无法有效扩展。在本文中，我们描述了将隐私性、可扩展性和实用性结合起来构建一个克服这些限制的系统的方法。 Meta 系统的 PAPAYA 系统利用可信执行环境 (TEE) 并优化设备上计算资源的使用，以促进跨大型设备群的联合数据处理，同时确保强大、可防御且可验证的隐私保护。与联邦学习系统（机器学习工作负载）相比，我们专注于联邦分析（统计和监控），并且我们标记了关键差异。

items.title: ByteCheckpoint: A Unified Checkpointing System for Large Foundation Model Development.
items.abstract: Checkpointing to preserve training states is crucial during the development of Large Foundation Models (LFMs), for training resumption upon various failures or changes in GPU resources and parallelism configurations. In addition, saved checkpoints are dispatched to evaluation tasks or transferred across different training stages (e.g., from pre-training to post-training). All these scenarios require resharding distributed checkpoints from one parallelism to another. In production environments, different LFMs are trained with various frameworks and storage backends, depending on model sizes and training scales. A high performance checkpointing system is needed to enable efficient checkpoint management at scale throughout the lifecycle of LFM development. We introduce ByteCheckpoint, an industrial-grade checkpointing system for large-scale LFM training. ByteCheckpoint features: a parallelism-agnostic checkpoint representation that enables efficient load-time checkpoint resharding; a generic checkpoint saving/loading workflow to accommodate multiple training frameworks and support different storage backends; full-stack optimizations to ensure high I/O efficiency and scalability; a suite of monitoring tools to streamline large-scale performance analysis and bottleneck detection. Compared to existing open-source checkpointing systems [51, 57], ByteCheckpoint significantly reduces runtime checkpoint stalls, achieving an average reduction of 54.20×. For saving and loading times, ByteCheckpoint achieves improvements of up to 9.96× and 8.80×, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在大型基础模型 (LFM) 的开发过程中，用于保留训练状态的检查点至关重要，以便在 GPU 资源和并行配置发生各种故障或变化时恢复训练。此外，保存的检查点被分配给评估任务或在不同的训练阶段（例如，从训练前到训练后）转移。所有这些场景都需要将分布式检查点从一种并行性重新分片到另一种并行性。在生产环境中，根据模型大小和训练规模，不同的 LFM 使用不同的框架和存储后端进行训练。需要高性能检查点系统来在 LFM 开发的整个生命周期中实现大规模的高效检查点管理。我们推出了 ByteCheckpoint，这是一种用于大规模 LFM 训练的工业级检查点系统。 ByteCheckpoint 功能：与并行性无关的检查点表示，可实现高效的加载时检查点重新分片；通用检查点保存/加载工作流程，以适应多个训练框架并支持不同的存储后端；全栈优化，保证高I/O效率和可扩展性；一套监控工具，用于简化大规模性能分析和瓶颈检测。与现有的开源检查点系统[51, 57]相比，ByteCheckpoint 显着减少了运行时检查点停顿，平均减少了 54.20 倍。对于保存和加载时间，ByteCheckpoint 分别实现了高达 9.96 倍和 8.80 倍的改进。

items.title: CATO: End-to-End Optimization of ML-Based Traffic Analysis Pipelines.
items.abstract: Machine learning has shown tremendous potential for improving the capabilities of network traffic analysis applications, often outperforming simpler rule-based heuristics. However, ML-based solutions remain difficult to deploy in practice. Many existing approaches only optimize the predictive performance of their models, overlooking the practical challenges of running them against network traffic in real time. This is especially problematic in the domain of traffic analysis, where the efficiency of the serving pipeline is a critical factor in determining the usability of a model. In this work, we introduce CATO, a framework that addresses this problem by jointly optimizing the predictive performance and the associated systems costs of the serving pipeline. CATO leverages recent advances in multi-objective Bayesian optimization to efficiently identify Pareto-optimal configurations, and automatically compiles end-to-end optimized serving pipelines that can be deployed in real networks. Our evaluations show that compared to popular feature optimization techniques, CATO can provide up to 3600× lower inference latency and 3.7× higher zero-loss throughput while simultaneously achieving better model performance.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习在提高网络流量分析应用程序的能力方面表现出了巨大的潜力，通常优于更简单的基于规则的启发式方法。然而，基于机器学习的解决方案在实践中仍然难以部署。许多现有方法仅优化其模型的预测性能，而忽略了实时针对网络流量运行模型的实际挑战。这在流量分析领域尤其成问题，其中服务管道的效率是确定模型可用性的关键因素。在这项工作中，我们引入了 CATO，这是一个通过联合优化服务管道的预测性能和相关系统成本来解决此问题的框架。 CATO 利用多目标贝叶斯优化的最新进展来有效识别帕累托最优配置，并自动编译可部署在实际网络中的端到端优化服务管道。我们的评估表明，与流行的特征优化技术相比，CATO 可以提供高达 3600 倍的低推理延迟和高 3.7 倍的零丢失吞吐量，同时实现更好的模型性能。

items.title: Resolving Packets from Counters: Enabling Multi-scale Network Traffic Super Resolution via Composable Large Traffic Model.
items.abstract: Realistic fine-grained traffic traces are valuable to numerous applications in both academia and industry. However, obtaining them directly from devices is significantly challenging, while coarse-grained counters are readily available on almost all network devices. None of existing work can restore fine-grained traffic traces from counters, which we call network traffic super-resolution (TSR). To this end, we propose ZOOMSYNTH, the first TSR system that can achieve packet-level trace synthesis with counter traces as input. Following the basic structure of the TSR task, we design the Granular Traffic Transformer (GTT) model and the Composable Large Traffic Model (CLTM). CLTM is a tree of GTT models, and the GTT models in each layer perform upscaling on a particular granularity, which allows each GTT model to capture the traffic characteristics at this resolution. Using CLTM, we synthesize fine-grained traces from counters. We also leverage a rule-following model to comprehend counter rules (e.g. ACLs) when available, guiding the generations of fine-grained traces. We implement ZOOMSYNTH and perform extensive evaluations. Results show that, with only second-level counter traces, ZOOMSYNTH achieves synthesis quality comparable to existing solutions that takes packet-level traces as input. CLTM can also be fine-tuned to support downstream tasks. For example, ZOOMSYNTH with fine-tuned CLTM outperforms the existing solution by 27.5% and 9.8% in anomaly detection and service recognition tasks, respectively. To promote future research, we release the pre-trained CLTM-1.8B model weights along with its source code.
items.abstract_zh: 真实的细粒度流量跟踪对于学术界和工业界的众多应用都很有价值。然而，直接从设备获取它们非常具有挑战性，而粗粒度计数器几乎可以在所有网络设备上使用。现有的工作都无法从计数器恢复细粒度的流量跟踪，我们称之为网络流量超分辨率（TSR）。为此，我们提出了 ZOOMSYNTH，这是第一个可以以计数器跟踪作为输入实现数据包级跟踪合成的 TSR 系统。根据 TSR 任务的基本结构，我们设计了粒度流量变换器（GTT）模型和可组合大流量模型（CLTM）。 CLTM是一棵GTT模型树，每一层的GTT模型都在特定的粒度上进行升级，这使得每个GTT模型能够捕获该分辨率下的流量特征。使用 CLTM，我们从计数器合成细粒度的痕迹。我们还利用规则遵循模型来理解可用的反规则（例如 ACL），指导细粒度跟踪的生成。我们实施 ZOOMSYNTH 并进行广泛的评估。结果表明，仅使用二级计数器跟踪，ZOOMSYNTH 即可实现与采用数据包级跟踪作为输入的现有解决方案相当的综合质量。 CLTM 还可以进行微调以支持下游任务。例如，经过微调的 CLTM 的 ZOOMSYNTH 在异常检测和服务识别任务中分别比现有解决方案提高了 27.5% 和 9.8%。为了促进未来的研究，我们发布了预训练的 CLTM-1.8B 模型权重及其源代码。

items.title: SimAI: Unifying Architecture Design and Performance Tuning for Large-Scale Large Language Model Training with Scalability and Precision.
items.abstract: The large number of GPUs required for a single LLM training significantly hinders the validation of new designs, tunings, and optimizations, calling for the occurrence of efficient simulators. Existing simulators, however, only target a specific granularity of the entire training, intrinsically leading to imprecision. This paper presents SimAI, a unified simulator aiming at precisely and efficiently simulating the LLM training procedure at scale. Through selective and high-fidelity integration of the training frameworks, the kernel computation, and the collective communication library into the simulating procedure, SimAI achieves high precision in simulations. SimAI further conducts multi-thread acceleration and implements lock-free global context-sharing to accelerate the execution speed. The effectiveness of SimAI is validated by its performance results, which show an average of 98.1% alignment to real-world results under various test scenarios and affirm its robustness and adaptability from small-scale labs to large-scale industrial environments. SimAI delivers meaningful guidelines for new host designs and parameter settings, directly benefiting in-production LLM training. We also share experiences and lessons learned during the evolution of SimAI. SimAI is open sourced at https://github.com/aliyun/SimAI .
items.abstract_zh: 单个 LLM 训练所需的大量 GPU 严重阻碍了新设计、调整和优化的验证，需要高效模拟器的出现。然而，现有的模拟器仅针对整个训练的特定粒度，本质上导致不精确。本文介绍了 SimAI，这是一个统一的模拟器，旨在精确有效地大规模模拟法学硕士培训过程。通过将训练框架、内核计算和集体通信库选择性地、高保真地集成到仿真程序中，SimAI 实现了高精度的仿真。 SimAI进一步进行多线程加速，并实现无锁全局上下文共享，加快执行速度。 SimAI 的有效性通过其性能结果得到了验证，该结果显示在各种测试场景下与实际结果的平均吻合度为 98.1%，并证实了其从小规模实验室到大规模工业环境的稳健性和适应性。 SimAI 为新主机设计和参数设置提供了有意义的指南，直接有利于生产中的 LLM 培训。我们还分享 SimAI 发展过程中的经验教训。 SimAI 开源于 https://github.com/aliyun/SimAI 。

items.title: Region-based Content Enhancement for Efficient Video Analytics at the Edge.
items.abstract: Video analytics is widespread in various applications serving our society. Recent advances of content enhancement in video analytics offer signiﬁcant beneﬁts for the bandwidth saving and accuracy improvement. However, existing content-enhanced video analytics systems are excessively computationally expensive and provide extremely low throughput. In this paper, we present region-based content enhancement, that enhances only the important regions in videos, to improve analytical accuracy. Our system, RegenHance, enables high-accuracy and high-throughput video analytics at the edge by 1) a macroblock-based region importance predictor that identifies the important regions fast and precisely, 2) a regionaware enhancer that stitches sparsely distributed regions into dense tensors and enhances them efﬁciently, and 3) a proﬁle-based execution planer that allocates appropriate resources for enhancement and analytics components. We prototype RegenHance on ﬁve heterogeneous edge devices. Experiments on two analytical tasks reveal that region-based enhancement improves the overall accuracy of 10-19% and achieves 2-3× throughput compared to the state-of-the-art frame-based enhancement methods.
items.abstract_zh: 视频分析广泛应用于服务于我们社会的各种应用中。视频分析内容增强的最新进展为节省带宽和提高准确性提供了显着的好处。然而，现有的内容增强视频分析系统的计算成本过高，并且吞吐量极低。在本文中，我们提出了基于区域的内容增强，仅增强视频中的重要区域，以提高分析准确性。我们的系统 RegenHance 通过以下方式在边缘实现高精度和高吞吐量视频分析：1）基于宏块的区域重要性预测器，可快速准确地识别重要区域；2）区域感知增强器，将稀疏分布的区域拼接成密集张量并有效增强它们；3）基于配置文件的执行规划器，为增强和分析组件分配适当的资源。 We prototype RegenHance on ﬁve heterogeneous edge devices.两项分析任务的实验表明，与最先进的基于帧的增强方法相比，基于区域的增强将整体精度提高了 10-19%，并实现了 2-3 倍的吞吐量。

items.title: ODRP: On-Demand Remote Paging with Programmable RDMA.
items.abstract: Memory disaggregation with OS swapping is becoming popular for next-generation datacenters. RDMA is a promising technique for achieving this. However, RDMA does not support dynamic memory management in the data path. Current systems rely on RDMA’s control path operations, which are designed for coarse-grained memory management. This results in a trade-off between performance and memory utilization and also requires significant CPU usage, which is a limited resource on memory nodes. This paper introduces On-Demand Remote Paging, the first system that smartly chains native RDMA data path primitives to offload all memory access and management operations onto the RDMA-capable NIC (RNIC). However, efficiently implementing these operations is challenging due to the limited capability of RNIC. ODRP leverages the semantics of OS swapping and adopts a client-assisted principle to address the efficiency and functionality challenges. Compared to the state-of-the-art system, ODRP can achieve significantly better memory utilization, no CPU usage while introducing only a 0.8% to 14.6% performance overhead in real-world applications.
items.abstract_zh: 带有操作系统交换的内存分解在下一代数据中心中变得越来越流行。 RDMA 是实现这一目标的一项有前景的技术。但是，RDMA 不支持数据路径中的动态内存管理。当前系统依赖于 RDMA 的控制路径操作，该操作专为粗粒度内存管理而设计。这导致性能和内存利用率之间的权衡，并且还需要大量的 CPU 使用率，而 CPU 是内存节点上的有限资源。本文介绍了按需远程分页，这是第一个智能链接本机 RDMA 数据路径原语以将所有内存访问和管理操作卸载到支持 RDMA 的 NIC (RNIC) 的系统。然而，由于 RNIC 的能力有限，有效地实施这些操作具有挑战性。 ODRP 利用操作系统交换的语义，并采用客户端辅助原则来解决效率和功能挑战。与最先进的系统相比，ODRP 可以实现显着更好的内存利用率，不使用 CPU，同时在实际应用中仅引入 0.8% 至 14.6% 的性能开销。

items.title: OptiReduce: Resilient and Tail-Optimal AllReduce for Distributed Deep Learning in the Cloud.
items.abstract: We present OptiReduce, a new collective-communication system for the cloud with bounded, predictable completion times for deep-learning jobs in the presence of varying computation (stragglers) and communication (congestion and gradient drops) variabilities. OptiReduce exploits the inherent resiliency and the stochastic nature of distributed deep-learning (DDL) training and fine-tuning to work with approximated (or lost) gradients—providing an efficient balance between (tail) performance and the resulting accuracy of the trained models. Exploiting this domain-specific characteristic of DDL, OptiReduce introduces (1) mechanisms (e.g., unreliable bounded transport with adaptive timeout) to improve the DDL jobs’ tail execution time, and (2) strategies (e.g., Transpose AllReduce and Hadamard Transform) to mitigate the impact of gradient drops on model accuracy. Our evaluation shows that OptiReduce achieves 70% and 30% faster time-to-accuracy (TTA), on average, when operating in shared, cloud environments (e.g., CloudLab) compared to Gloo and NCCL, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 OptiReduce，这是一种新的云集体通信系统，在存在不同计算（落后者）和通信（拥塞和梯度下降）变化的情况下，深度学习作业的完成时间是有限的、可预测的。 OptiReduce 利用分布式深度学习 (DDL) 训练和微调的固有弹性和随机性来处理近似（或丢失）梯度，从而在训练模型的（尾部）性能和最终精度之间提供有效的平衡。利用 DDL 的这种特定于领域的特性，OptiReduce 引入了 (1) 机制（例如，具有自适应超时的不可靠有界传输）来改善 DDL 作业的尾部执行时间，以及 (2) 策略（例如 Transpose AllReduce 和 Hadamard Transform）来减轻梯度下降对模型精度的影响。我们的评估表明，与 Gloo 和 NCCL 相比，在共享云环境（例如 CloudLab）中运行时，OptiReduce 的准确时间 (TTA) 平均分别快了 70% 和 30%。

items.title: VEP: A Two-stage Verification Toolchain for Full eBPF Programmability.
items.abstract: Extended Berkely Package Filter (eBPF) is a revolutionary technology that can safely and efficiently extend kernel capabilities. It has been widely used in networking, tracing, security, and more. However, existing eBPF verifiers impose strict constraints, often requiring repeated modifications to eBPF programs to pass verification. To enhance programmability, we introduce VEP, an annotation-guided eBPF program verification toolchain. VEP consists of three components: VEP-C, a verifier for annotated eBPF-C programs; VEP-compiler, a compiler targeting annotated eBPF bytecode; and VEP-eBPF, a lightweight bytecode-level proof checker. VEP allows users to verify the correctness of their programs with appropriate annotations, thus enabling full programmability. Our experimental results demonstrate that VEP addresses the limitations of existing verifiers, i.e. the Linux verifier and PREVAIL, and provides a more flexible and automated approach to kernel security.
items.abstract_zh: 扩展伯克利包过滤器（eBPF）是一项革命性的技术，可以安全高效地扩展内核功能。它已广泛应用于网络、跟踪、安全等领域。然而，现有的 eBPF 验证器有严格的限制，通常需要对 eBPF 程序进行重复修改才能通过验证。为了增强可编程性，我们引入了 VEP，一个注释引导的 eBPF 程序验证工具链。 VEP 由三个组件组成：VEP-C，带注释的 eBPF-C 程序的验证器； VEP-compiler，一个针对带注释的 eBPF 字节码的编译器；以及 VEP-eBPF，一种轻量级字节码级证明检查器。 VEP 允许用户通过适当的注释验证其程序的正确性，从而实现完全的可编程性。我们的实验结果表明，VEP 解决了现有验证器（即 Linux 验证器和 PREVAIL）的局限性，并为内核安全提供了更灵活和自动化的方法。

items.title: BFTBrain: Adaptive BFT Consensus with Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: This paper presents BFTBrain, a reinforcement learning (RL) based Byzantine fault-tolerant (BFT) system that provides significant operational benefits: a plug-and-play system suitable for a broad set of hardware and network configurations, and adjusts effectively in real-time to changing fault scenarios and workloads. BFTBrain adapts to system conditions and application needs by switching between a set of BFT protocols in real-time. Two main advances contribute to BFTBrain’s agility and performance. First, BFTBrain is based on a systematic, thorough modeling of metrics that correlate the performance of the studied BFT protocols with varying fault scenarios and workloads. These metrics are fed as features to BFTBrain’s RL engine in order to choose the best-performing BFT protocols in real-time. Second, BFTBrain coordinates RL in a decentralized manner which is resilient to adversarial data pollution, where nodes share local metering values and reach the same learning output by consensus. As a result, in addition to providing significant operational benefits, BFTBrain improves throughput over fixed protocols by 18% to 119% under dynamic conditions and outperforms state-of-the-art learning based approaches by 44% to 154%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BFTBrain，这是一种基于强化学习 (RL) 的拜占庭容错 (BFT) 系统，可提供显着的运营优势：即插即用系统，适用于广泛的硬件和网络配置，并可以实时有效地调整以适应不断变化的故障场景和工作负载。 BFTBrain 通过在一组 BFT 协议之间实时切换来适应系统条件和应用需求。 BFTBrain 的敏捷性和性能有两项主要进步。首先，BFTBrain 基于系统、彻底的指标建模，将所研究的 BFT 协议的性能与不同的故障场景和工作负载相关联。这些指标作为特征输入 BFTBrain 的 RL 引擎，以便实时选择性能最佳的 BFT 协议。其次，BFTBrain 以去中心化的方式协调强化学习，这种方式能够抵御对抗性数据污染，其中节点共享本地计量值并通过共识达到相同的学习输出。因此，除了提供显着的运营优势外，BFTBrain 在动态条件下将固定协议的吞吐量提高了 18% 至 119%，并且比最先进的基于学习的方法提高了 44% 至 154%。

items.title: Building Massive MIMO Baseband Processing on a Single-Node Supercomputer.
items.abstract: The rising deployment of massive MIMO coupled with the wide adoption of virtualized radio access networks (vRAN) poses an unprecedented computational demand on the baseband processing, hardly met by existing vRAN hardware substrates. The single-node supercomputer, an emerging computing platform, offers scalable computation and communication capabilities, making it a promising target to hold and run the baseband pipeline. However, realizing this is non-trivial due to the mismatch between (a) the diverse execution granularities and incongruent parallel degrees of different stages along the software processing pipeline and (b) the underlying evolving irregular hardware parallelism at runtime. This paper closes the gap by designing and implementing MegaStation–an application-platform co-designed system that effectively harnesses the computing power of a single-node supercomputer for processing massive MIMO baseband. Our key insight is that one can adjust the execution granularity and reconstruct the baseband processing pipeline on the fly based on the monitored hardware parallelism status. Inspired by dynamic instruction scheduling, MegaStation models the single-node supercomputer as a tightly coupled microprocessor and employs a scoreboarding-like algorithm to orchestrate "baseband processing" instructions over GPU-instantiated executors. Our evaluations using the GigaIO FabreX demonstrate that MegaStation achieves up to 66.2% lower tail frame processing latency and 4× higher throughput than state-of-the-art solutions. MegaStation is a scalable and adaptive solution that can meet today’s vRAN requirements.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模 MIMO 的不断部署，加上虚拟化无线接入网络 (vRAN) 的广泛采用，对基带处理提出了前所未有的计算需求，而现有的 vRAN 硬件基板很难满足。单节点超级计算机是一种新兴的计算平台，提供可扩展的计算和通信能力，使其成为保持和运行基带管道的有希望的目标。然而，实现这一点并非易事，因为（a）软件处理管道上不同阶段的不同执行粒度和不一致的并行度与（b）运行时底层不断发展的不规则硬件并行性之间的不匹配。本文通过设计和实现 MegaStation 来弥补这一差距，MegaStation 是一个应用平台共同设计的系统，可有效利用单节点超级计算机的计算能力来处理大规模 MIMO 基带。我们的主要见解是，可以根据监控的硬件并行状态动态调整执行粒度并重建基带处理管道。受动态指令调度的启发，MegaStation 将单节点超级计算机建模为紧密耦合的微处理器，并采用类似记分板的算法在 GPU 实例化的执行器上编排“基带处理”指令。我们使用 GigaIO FabreX 进行的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，MegaStation 的尾帧处理延迟降低了 66.2%，吞吐量提高了 4 倍。 MegaStation 是一种可扩展、自适应的解决方案，可以满足当今的 vRAN 要求。

items.title: Rajomon: Decentralized and Coordinated Overload Control for Latency-Sensitive Microservices.
items.abstract: Microservices are increasingly central for cloud applications due to their flexibility and support for rapid integration and deployment. However, applications often experience overload or sudden traffic surges that exceed service capacity, resulting in increased latency or service failures. Moreover, microservices are decentralized, interdependent, and multiplexed, exacerbating risks from overload. We present RAJOMON, a market-based overload control system for large microservice graphs. RAJOMON controls overload through distributed rate-limiting and load shedding. Clients attach tokens to requests and services charge a price for each API, dropping requests with insufficient tokens. Tokens and prices propagate through the entire call graph, piggybacking on requests and responses. Thus, RAJOMON is the first decentralized, end-to-end overload control system. We implement and evaluate RAJOMON on a setup of up to 140 cores and on a variety of applications from academia and industry. Experiments indicate RAJOMON protects microservice goodput and tail latency from substantial demand spikes, even in the case of mixed request types and deeper service graphs. For high-load scenarios, RAJOMON reduces tail latency by 78% and increases goodput by 45% when compared against state-of-the-art overload control for microservices.
items.abstract_zh: 微服务因其灵活性以及对快速集成和部署的支持而日益成为云应用程序的核心。然而，应用程序经常会遇到过载或突然的流量激增超出服务容量的情况，从而导致延迟增加或服务故障。此外，微服务是分散的、相互依赖的和多重的，加剧了过载的风险。我们推出 RAJOMON，一种基于市场的大型微服务图过载控制系统。 RAJOMON 通过分布式速率限制和减载来控制过载。客户端将令牌附加到请求，服务对每个 API 收费，并丢弃令牌不足的请求。 Tokens and prices propagate through the entire call graph, piggybacking on requests and responses.因此，RAJOMON 是第一个分散式端到端过载控制系统。我们在多达 140 个内核的设置以及来自学术界和工业界的各种应用程序上实施和评估 RAJOMON。实验表明，即使在混合请求类型和更深的服务图的情况下，RAJOMON 也能保护微服务的吞吐量和尾部延迟免受大量需求峰值的影响。对于高负载场景，与最先进的微服务过载控制相比，RAJOMON 将尾部延迟减少了 78%，并将吞吐量提高了 45%。

items.title: AutoCCL: Automated Collective Communication Tuning for Accelerating Distributed and Parallel DNN Training.
items.abstract: The collective communication libraries are pivotal in optimizing the performance of distributed and parallel deep neural network (DNN) training. Most network optimizations are under the assumption that these libraries are well-tuned, ignoring their low-level parameter selection. In this paper, we present a novel automated tuning method AutoCCL that significantly improves communication performance without incurring additional costs. One of the primary challenges we tackle is the state explosion in searching for the optimal configuration. To overcome this, we decouple implementation-related parameters from those sensitive to the search space size and propose a divide-and-conquer algorithm, minimizing the requirement for exhaustive trials. We further propose an online tuning approach that accounts for communication-computation interference to enhance accuracy in finding optimal configurations, while hiding tuning overhead within early iterations of training jobs. We implement AutoCCL atop NCCL, a leading and widely-used communication library provided by NVIDIA. Our evaluation on both a 2-node cluster (16 A40 GPUs, intra-node NVLink, inter-node 2× 400Gbps InfiniBand) and a 4-node cluster (32 A40 GPUs, intra-node PCIe, inter-node 100Gbps InfiniBand) demonstrates that AutoCCL achieves 1.24-1.29× and 1.15-1.22× speedups on microbenchmarks compared to NCCL and another SOTA NCCL tuner, respectively, and up to 1.80× and 1.49× with concurrent computation. End-to-end evaluations on three large language models and one vision model show 1.07-1.32× improvements in periteration training time.
items.abstract_zh: 集体通信库对于优化分布式并行深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的性能至关重要。大多数网络优化都是假设这些库经过良好调整，忽略了它们的低级参数选择。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自动调整方法 AutoCCL，它可以显着提高通信性能，而不会产生额外的成本。我们解决的主要挑战之一是寻找最佳配置时的状态爆炸。为了克服这个问题，我们将与实现相关的参数与对搜索空间大小敏感的参数解耦，并提出了一种分而治之的算法，最大限度地减少了详尽试验的要求。我们进一步提出了一种在线调整方法，该方法考虑了通信计算干扰，以提高寻找最佳配置的准确性，同时隐藏训练作业早期迭代中的调整开销。我们在 NCCL 之上实现 AutoCCL，NCCL 是 NVIDIA 提供的领先且广泛使用的通信库。我们对 2 节点集群（16 个 A40 GPU、节点内 NVLink、节点间 2× 400Gbps InfiniBand）和 4 节点集群（32 个 A40 GPU、节点内 PCIe、节点间 100Gbps InfiniBand）的评估表明，与微基准测试相比，AutoCCL 在微基准上实现了 1.24-1.29 倍和 1.15-1.22 倍的加速NCCL 和另一个 SOTA NCCL 调谐器，并发计算分别高达 1.80× 和 1.49×。对三种大型语言模型和一种视觉模型的端到端评估显示，迭代训练时间提高了 1.07-1.32 倍。

items.title: State-Compute Replication: Parallelizing High-Speed Stateful Packet Processing.
items.abstract: With the slowdown of Moore’s law, CPU-oriented packet processing in software will be significantly outpaced by emerging line speeds of network interface cards (NICs). Single-core packet-processing throughput has saturated. We consider the problem of high-speed packet processing with multiple CPU cores. The key challenge is state—memory that multiple packets must read and update. The prevailing method to scale throughput with multiple cores involves state sharding, processing all packets that update the same state, e.g., flow, at the same core. However, given the skewed nature of realistic flow size distributions, this method is untenable, since total throughput is limited by single-core performance. This paper introduces state-compute replication, a principle to scale the throughput of a single stateful flow across multiple cores using replication. Our design leverages a packet history sequencer running on a NIC or top-of-the-rack switch to enable multiple cores to update state without explicit synchronization. Our experiments with realistic data center and wide-area Internet traces show that state-compute replication can scale total packet-processing throughput linearly with cores, independent of flow size distributions, across a range of realistic packet-processing programs.
items.abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的放缓，软件中面向 CPU 的数据包处理速度将明显被网络接口卡 (NIC) 的新兴线路速度所超越。单核数据包处理吞吐量已饱和。我们考虑多CPU核高速数据包处理的问题。关键的挑战是多个数据包必须读取和更新的状态内存。扩展多核吞吐量的流行方法涉及状态分片，即在同一核处理更新相同状态（例如流）的所有数据包。然而，考虑到实际流大小分布的倾斜性质，这种方法是站不住脚的，因为总吞吐量受到单核性能的限制。本文介绍了状态计算复制，这是一种使用复制来扩展跨多个核心的单个状态流的吞吐量的原理。我们的设计利用在 NIC 或架顶交换机上运行的数据包历史排序器，使多个内核能够更新状态，而无需显式同步。我们对真实数据中心和广域互联网跟踪的实验表明，状态计算复制可以在一系列真实的数据包处理程序中随内核线性扩展总数据包处理吞吐量，而与流大小分布无关。

items.title: GREEN: Carbon-efficient Resource Scheduling for Machine Learning Clusters.
items.abstract: This paper explores the problem of scheduling machine Learning (ML) jobs while also taking into account the reduction of carbon emissions in the cluster. Traditional cluster schedulers for ML jobs mainly focus on optimizing job completion time~(JCT), but do not consider the environmental impact of their decisions, resulting in a suboptimal carbon footprint. To address this issue, we propose GREEN, an ML cluster scheduler that is both time-efficient and carbon-efficient. At its core, GREEN uses a unique carbon-aware scheduling algorithm that reduces carbon footprint with minimized impact on JCT. Additionally, it leverages the temporal flexibility of ML jobs to reduce carbon emissions by shifting workloads to less carbon-intensive times, while still maintaining overall daily capacity. Our experiments using real ML jobs workload demonstrate that GREEN can achieve up to 41.2% reduction in cluster-wide carbon footprint and 12% reduction in peak power consumption, while incurring 3.6%-5.9% time efficiency tradeoff compared to existing methods.
items.abstract_zh: 本文探讨了机器学习（ML）作业的调度问题，同时也考虑到集群中碳排放的减少。传统的机器学习作业集群调度程序主要关注优化作业完成时间（JCT），但没有考虑其决策对环境的影响，导致碳足迹不理想。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 GREEN，一种既省时又省碳的 ML 集群调度程序。 GREEN 的核心是采用独特的碳感知调度算法，可减少碳足迹，同时将对 JCT 的影响降至最低。此外，它还利用机器学习作业的时间灵活性，通过将工作负载转移到碳密集度较低的时间来减少碳排放，同时仍保持总体每日容量。我们使用真实的 ML 作业工作负载进行的实验表明，与现有方法相比，GREEN 可以使集群范围内的碳足迹减少高达 41.2%，峰值功耗减少 12%，同时产生 3.6%-5.9% 的时间效率权衡。

items.title: Vegeta: Enabling Parallel Smart Contract Execution in Leaderless Blockchains.
items.abstract: Consensus and smart contract execution play complementary roles in blockchain systems. Leaderless consensus, as a promising direction in the blockchain context, can better utilize the resources of each node and/or avoid incurring the extra burden of timing assumptions. As modern Byzantine-Fault Tolerant (BFT) consensus protocols can order several hundred thousand transactions per second, contract execution is becoming the performance bottleneck. Adding concurrency to contract execution is a natural way to boost its performance, but none of the existing frameworks is a perfect fit for leaderless consensus. We propose speculate-order-replay, a generic framework tailored to leaderless consensus protocols. Our framework allows each proposer to (pre-)process transactions prior to consensus, better utilizing its computing resources. We instantiate the framework with a concrete concurrency control protocol Vegeta. Vegeta speculatively executes a series of transactions and analyzes their dependencies before consensus, and later deterministically replays the schedule. We ran experiments under the real-world Ethereum workload on 16vCPU virtual machines. Our evaluation results show that Vegeta achieved up to 7.8× speedup compared to serial execution. When deployed on top of a leaderless consensus protocol with 10 nodes, Vegeta still achieved 6.9× speedup.
items.abstract_zh: 共识和智能合约执行在区块链系统中发挥着互补作用。无领导共识作为区块链环境中的一个有前途的方向，可以更好地利用每个节点的资源和/或避免产生时序假设的额外负担。由于现代拜占庭容错（BFT）共识协议每秒可以订购数十万笔交易，合约执行正在成为性能瓶颈。在合约执行中添加并发性是提高其性能的自然方法，但现有框架都不是完美适合无领导共识的。我们提出推测顺序重放，这是一个针对无领导共识协议量身定制的通用框架。我们的框架允许每个提议者在达成共识之前（预）处理交易，更好地利用其计算资源。我们使用具体的并发控制协议 Vegeta 实例化该框架。 Vegeta 推测性地执行一系列交易并在达成共识之前分析它们的依赖关系，然后确定性地重播计划。我们在 16vCPU 虚拟机上的真实以太坊工作负载下进行了实验。我们的评估结果表明，与串行执行相比，Vegeta 实现了高达 7.8 倍的加速。当部署在具有 10 个节点的无领导共识协议之上时，Vegeta 仍然实现了 6.9 倍的加速。

items.title: GPU-Disaggregated Serving for Deep Learning Recommendation Models at Scale.
items.abstract: Online recommender systems use deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) to provide accurate, personalized recommendations to improve customer experience. However, efficiently provisioning DLRM services at scale is challenging. DLRMs exhibit distinct resource usage patterns: they require a large number of CPU cores and a tremendous amount of memory, but only a small number of GPUs. Running them in multi-GPU servers quickly exhausts the servers' CPU and memory resources, leaving a large number of unallocated GPUs stranded, unable to utilize by other tasks. This paper describes Prism, a production DLRM serving system that eliminates GPU fragmentation by means of resource disaggregation. In Prism, a fleet of CPU nodes (CNs) interconnect with a cluster of heterogeneous GPU nodes (HNs) through RDMA, leading to two disaggregated resource pools that can independently scale. Prism automatically divides DLRMs into CPU- and GPU-intensive subgraphs and schedules them on CNs and HNs for disaggregated serving. Prism employs various techniques to minimize the latency overhead caused by disaggregation, including optimal graph partitioning, topology-aware resource management, and SLO-aware communication scheduling. Evaluations show that Prism effectively reduces CPU and GPU fragmentation by 53% and 27% in a crowded GPU cluster. During seasonal promotion events, it efficiently enables capacity loaning from training clusters, saving over 90% of GPUs. Prism has been deployed in production clusters for over two years and now runs on over 10k GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 在线推荐系统使用深度学习推荐模型 (DLRM) 提供准确、个性化的推荐，以改善客户体验。然而，大规模有效地配置 DLRM 服务具有挑战性。 DLRM 表现出独特的资源使用模式：它们需要大量的 CPU 核心和大量的内存，但只需要少量的 GPU。在多 GPU 服务器中运行它们会很快耗尽服务器的 CPU 和内存资源，导致大量未分配的 GPU 闲置，无法被其他任务利用。本文介绍了 Prism，这是一种生产 DLRM 服务系统，可通过资源分解来消除 GPU 碎片。在 Prism 中，一组 CPU 节点 (CN) 通过 RDMA 与一组异构 GPU 节点 (HN) 互连，从而形成两个可以独立扩展的分解资源池。 Prism 自动将 DLRM 划分为 CPU 和 GPU 密集型子图，并将它们调度到 CN 和 HN 上以进行分类服务。 Prism 采用各种技术来最大限度地减少分解造成的延迟开销，包括最佳图分区、拓扑感知资源管理和 SLO 感知通信调度。评估表明，在拥挤的GPU集群中，Prism有效地将CPU和GPU碎片减少了53%和27%。在季节性促销活动期间，高效实现训练集群容量借用，节省90%以上的GPU资源。 Prism 已在生产集群中部署了两年多，现在运行在超过 10k 个 GPU 上。

items.title: Holmes: Localizing Irregularities in LLM Training with Mega-scale GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Training Large Language Models (LLMs) on large-scale GPU clusters requires numerous iterations over several months. Existing works mainly focus on addressing failures that interrupt the iterative training process to improve the utilization of GPU clusters. However, our large-scale measurements over tens of thousands of GPUs show that the training process exhibits an unstable state with some irregular iterations taking even more than twice the time of a normal iteration. Surprisingly, we find that these irregular iterations greatly extend the time of LLM training, which is even more severe than the impact of failures. Meanwhile, the irregular phenomenon is silent, making it challenging to be accurately localized. In this paper, we propose a first-of-its-kind system called Holmes, leveraging communication operators to accurately localize these irregularities in real-time. The core of Holmes's approach is to employ an enhanced abnormal operator detection model and a novel communication operator graph to perform efficient irregularity localization. Furthermore, Holmes conducts cross-iteration analysis to improve localization accuracy. We evaluate Holmes using large-scale trace-driven simulations and a production-level prototype. Large-scale simulation results demonstrate that Holmes achieves irregularity localization accuracy of 97.21%. Production-level prototype evaluation results show Holmes can localize irregularity within 30.3 seconds, achieving a speedup of 6.52× as compared to traditional approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 在大规模 GPU 集群上训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 需要在几个月内进行多次迭代。现有的工作主要集中于解决中断迭代训练过程的故障，以提高 GPU 集群的利用率。然而，我们对数万个 GPU 的大规模测量表明，训练过程表现出不稳定状态，一些不规则迭代的时间甚至是正常迭代时间的两倍以上。令人惊讶的是，我们发现这些不规则的迭代极大地延长了LLM训练的时间，这甚至比失败的影响还要严重。同时，不规则现象是无声的，这使得准确定位具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Holmes 的首创系统，利用通信运营商实时准确定位这些违规行为。 Holmes 方法的核心是采用增强的异常算子检测模型和新颖的通信算子图来执行有效的不规则定位。此外，Holmes 还进行交叉迭代分析以提高定位精度。我们使用大规模跟踪驱动模拟和生产级原型来评估 Holmes。大规模仿真结果表明Holmes的不规则定位精度达到97.21%。生产级原型评估结果表明，Holmes 可以在 30.3 秒内定位不规则性，与传统方法相比，速度提高了 6.52 倍。

items.title: Eden: Developer-Friendly Application-Integrated Far Memory.
items.abstract: Far memory systems are a promising way to address the resource stranding problem in datacenters. Far memory systems broadly fall into two categories. On one hand, paging-based systems use hardware guards at the granularity of pages to intercept remote accesses, which require no application changes but incur significant faulting overhead. On the other hand, app-integrated systems use software guards on data objects and apply application-specific optimizations to avoid faulting overheads, but these systems require significant application redesign and/or suffer from overhead on local accesses. We propose Eden, a new approach to far memory that combines hardware guards with a small number of software guards in the form of programmer annotations, to achieve performance similar to app-integrated systems with minimal developer effort. Eden is based on the insight that applications generate most of their page faults at a small number of code locations, and those locations are easy to find programmatically. By adding hints to such locations, Eden can notify the pager about upcoming memory accesses to customize read-ahead and memory reclamation. We show that Eden achieves 19.4–178% higher performance than Fastswap for memory-intensive applications including DataFrame and memcached. Eden achieves performance comparable to AIFM with almost 100× fewer code changes.
items.abstract_zh: 远存储系统是解决数据中心资源搁浅问题的一种有前途的方法。远记忆系统大致分为两类。一方面，基于分页的系统使用页面粒度的硬件防护来拦截远程访问，这不需要更改应用程序，但会产生大量的故障开销。另一方面，应用程序集成系统对数据对象使用软件防护，并应用特定于应用程序的优化以避免故障开销，但这些系统需要大量的应用程序重新设计和/或遭受本地访问开销。我们提出了 Eden，一种新的远内存方法，它将硬件防护与少量以程序员注释形式的软件防护相结合，以最少的开发人员工作实现与应用程序集成系统类似的性能。 Eden 基于这样的见解：应用程序在少数代码位置生成大部分页面错误，并且这些位置很容易通过编程方式找到。通过向这些位置添加提示，Eden 可以通知分页器即将进行的内存访问，以自定义预读和内存回收。我们表明，对于 DataFrame 和 memcached 等内存密集型应用程序，Eden 的性能比 Fastswap 高出 19.4-178%。 Eden 的性能可与 AIFM 相媲美，而代码更改量却减少了近 100 倍。

items.title: Learning Production-Optimized Congestion Control Selection for Alibaba Cloud CDN.
items.abstract: Today's content delivery networks (CDNs) typically use static congestion control (CC) configurations, yet the diverse network environments preclude a universally optimal CC for all geographical regions, as evidenced by our extensive measurements. Current CC algorithms, limited by narrow applicability or high maintenance costs, struggle in large-scale CDNs. This work introduces AliCCS, the first CC Selection (CCS) approach tailored for production CDN, integrating fine-grained domain knowledge for learning to choose the best CC from existing, well-established ones. Through an over-one-year real-world deployment in Alibaba Cloud CDN, AliCCS has enhanced the Quality-of-Experience (QoE) by up to 9.31%, surpassing the competitive margin in the CDN market, and significantly reduced the retransmission rate by 25.51% to 174.36% across all provinces of China, leading to cost savings over 10 million US dollars. We also share key insights and experiences from deploying AliCCS at scale, highlighting traffic patterns in Alibaba Cloud CDN.
items.abstract_zh: 当今的内容分发网络 (CDN) 通常使用静态拥塞控制 (CC) 配置，但多样化的网络环境阻碍了所有地理区域的通用最佳 CC，正如我们广泛的测量所证明的那样。目前的CC算法由于适用性窄或维护成本高，在大规模CDN中举步维艰。这项工作介绍了 AliCCS，这是第一个为生产 CDN 量身定制的 CC 选择 (CCS) 方法，它集成了细粒度的领域知识，用于学习从现有的、成熟的 CC 中选择最佳的 CC。通过阿里云CDN一年多的实际部署，AliCCS的体验质量（QoE）提升了高达9.31%，超越了CDN市场的竞争优势，并在中国各省份大幅降低了重传率25.51%至174.36%，节省成本超过1000万美元。我们还分享了大规模部署 AliCCS 的重要见解和经验，重点介绍了阿里云 CDN 中的流量模式。

items.title: On Temporal Verification of Stateful P4 Programs.
items.abstract: Stateful P4 programs offload network states from the control plane to the data plane, enabling unprecedented network programmability. However, existing P4 verifiers overapproximate the stateful nature of P4 programs and are inherently inadequate for verifying network functions that require stateful decision-making. To overcome this limitation, this paper introduces an innovative approach to verify P4 programs while accounting for their stateful feature. We propose a specification language named P4LTL, tailored for describing temporal properties of stateful P4 programs at the packet processing level. Additionally, we introduce a novel concept called the Büchi transaction, representing the product of the P4 program and the P4LTL specification. The P4 program verification problem can be reduced to determining the existence of any fair and feasible trace within the Büchi transaction. To the best of our knowledge, our approach represents the first endeavor in temporal verification of stateful P4 programs at the packet processing level. We implemented a prototype tool called p4tv. Evaluation results demonstrate p4tv’s effectiveness and efficiency in temporal verification of stateful P4 programs.
items.abstract_zh: 有状态 P4 程序将网络状态从控制平面卸载到数据平面，从而实现前所未有的网络可编程性。然而，现有的 P4 验证器过于接近 P4 程序的有状态性质，并且本质上不足以验证需要有状态决策的网络功能。为了克服这一限制，本文引入了一种创新方法来验证 P4 程序，同时考虑其有状态特征。我们提出了一种名为 P4LTL 的规范语言，专门用于描述数据包处理级别的有状态 P4 程序的时间属性。此外，我们引入了一个称为 Büchi 交易的新颖概念，代表 P4 程序和 P4LTL 规范的产物。 P4 程序验证问题可以简化为确定 Büchi 交易中是否存在任何公平可行的踪迹。据我们所知，我们的方法代表了在数据包处理级别对有状态 P4 程序进行时间验证的首次尝试。我们实现了一个名为 p4tv 的原型工具。评估结果证明了 p4tv 在有状态 P4 程序的时间验证方面的有效性和效率。

items.title: White-Boxing RDMA with Packet-Granular Software Control.
items.abstract: Driven by diverse workloads and deployments, numerous innovations emerge to customize RDMA transport, spanning congestion control, multi-tenant isolation, routing, and more. However, RDMA's hardware-offloading nature poses significant rigidity when landing these innovations. Prior workflows to deliver customizations have either waited for lengthy hardware iterations, developed bespoke hardware, or applied coarse-grained control over the black-box RDMA NIC. Despite considerable efforts, current customization workflows still lack flexibility, raw performance, and broad availability. In this work, we advocate for White-Boxing RDMA, which provides control of the hardware transport to general-purpose software while preserving raw data path performance. To facilitate the white-boxing methodology, we design and implement Software-Controlled RDMA (SCR) , a framework enabling packet-granular software control over the hardware transport. To address challenges stemming from granular control over high-speed line rates, SCR employs effective control models, boosts the efficiency of subsystems within the framework, and leverages emerging hardware capabilities. We implement SCR on the latest Nvidia BlueField-3 equipped with Datapath Accelerators, delivering a spectrum of new customizations not present in legacy RDMA transport, such as Multi-Tenant Fair Scheduler, User-Defined Congestion Control, Receiver-Driven Flow Control, and Multi-Path Routing Selection. Furthermore, we demonstrate SCR's applicability for GPU-Direct and NVMe-oF RDMA with zero modifications to machine learning or storage code.
items.abstract_zh: 在不同的工作负载和部署的推动下，出现了大量定制 RDMA 传输的创新，涵盖拥塞控制、多租户隔离、路由等。然而，RDMA 的硬件卸载特性在实现这些创新时带来了显着的刚性。以前提供定制的工作流程要么等待漫长的硬件迭代，开发定制硬件，要么对黑盒 RDMA NIC 应用粗粒度控制。尽管付出了巨大的努力，当前的定制工作流程仍然缺乏灵活性、原始性能和广泛的可用性。在这项工作中，我们提倡白盒 RDMA，它提供对通用软件的硬件传输控制，同时保留原始数据路径性能。为了促进白盒方法，我们设计并实现了软件控制 RDMA (SCR)，这是一个能够对硬件传输进行数据包粒度软件控制的框架。为了应对高速线速精细控制带来的挑战，SCR 采用有效的控制模型，提高框架内子系统的效率，并利用新兴的硬件功能。我们在配备数据路径加速器的最新 Nvidia BlueField-3 上实施 SCR，提供传统 RDMA 传输中不存在的一系列新定制，例如多租户公平调度程序、用户定义的拥塞控制、接收器驱动的流量控制和多路径路由选择。此外，我们还展示了 SCR 对 GPU-Direct 和 NVMe-oF RDMA 的适用性，并且对机器学习或存储代码进行零修改。

items.title: Efficient Direct-Connect Topologies for Collective Communications.
items.abstract: We consider the problem of distilling efficient network topologies for collective communications. We provide an algorithmic framework for constructing direct-connect topologies optimized for the latency vs. bandwidth trade-off associated with the workload. Our approach synthesizes many different topologies and communication schedules for a given cluster size and degree, then identifies the best option for a given workload. Our algorithms start from small, optimal base topologies and associated schedules, using techniques that can be iteratively applied to derive much larger topologies and schedules. Additionally, we incorporate well-studied large-scale graph topologies into our algorithmic framework by producing efficient communication schedules for them using a novel polynomial-time algorithm. Our evaluation uses multiple testbeds and large-scale simulations to demonstrate significant performance benefits from our derived topologies and schedules.
items.abstract_zh: 我们考虑为集体通信提炼有效网络拓扑的问题。我们提供了一个算法框架，用于构建针对与工作负载相关的延迟与带宽权衡进行优化的直连拓扑。我们的方法针对给定的集群大小和程度综合了许多不同的拓扑和通信调度，然后确定给定工作负载的最佳选择。我们的算法从小型的、最佳的基本拓扑和相关的调度开始，使用可迭代应用的技术来导出更大的拓扑和调度。此外，我们通过使用新颖的多项式时间算法为它们生成有效的通信时间表，将经过充分研究的大规模图拓扑合并到我们的算法框架中。我们的评估使用多个测试台和大规模模拟来证明我们派生的拓扑和时间表带来的显着性能优势。

items.title: MeshTest: End-to-End Testing for Service Mesh Traffic Management.
items.abstract: We present MeshTest, the first end-to-end testing framework for traffic management of service mesh. The key idea of MeshTest is to automatically generate input configurations with end-to-end semantics, and then create real test request suites on each input. There are two technical challenges. First, the input space of service mesh configurations is large and complex. The input configurations should be carefully orchestrated to form end-to-end service flow paths. Second, the abstract output network behavior cannot be directly checked for correctness, and we need to generate a set of real requests that are capable of checking possible behaviors. To address these challenges, we model the service flows of traffic management in service mesh, and propose a novel Service Flow Exploration technique to enumerate all possible configuration resources and interactions between them in the input configuration. We design and implement MeshTest, which contains an automatic input configuration generator based on Service Flow Exploration and a Service Mesh Oracle which leverages formal methods to generate test request suites. MeshTest has found 23 new bugs (19 confirmed and 10 fixed) in two popular service mesh systems, Istio and Linkerd.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 MeshTest，这是第一个用于服务网格流量管理的端到端测试框架。 MeshTest 的关键思想是自动生成具有端到端语义的输入配置，然后在每个输入上创建真正的测试请求套件。有两个技术挑战。首先，服务网格配置的输入空间庞大且复杂。应仔细编排输入配置以形成端到端的服务流路径。其次，抽象输出的网络行为无法直接检查其正确性，我们需要生成一组能够检查可能行为的真实请求。为了解决这些挑战，我们对服务网格中流量管理的服务流进行建模，并提出了一种新颖的服务流探索技术来枚举输入配置中所有可能的配置资源以及​​它们之间的交互。我们设计并实现了 MeshTest，它包含一个基于服务流探索的自动输入配置生成器和一个利用正式方法生成测试请求套件的 Service Mesh Oracle。 MeshTest 在两个流行的服务网格系统 Istio 和 Linkerd 中发现了 23 个新错误（19 个已确认，10 个已修复）。

items.title: When P4 Meets Run-to-completion Architecture.
items.abstract: P4 programmable data planes have significantly accelerated the evolution of various network technologies. Although the P4 language has gained wide acceptance, its further development encounters two obstacles: limited programmability and the cessation of the next-generation Tofino chip. As a hardware manufacturer, we try to address the above dilemmas by opening the P4 programmability of our run-to-completion (RTC) chips. At present, there is no publicly available experience in this field. We introduce P4RTC, a comprehensive consolidation of our experiences applying the P4 language to RTC architecture. P4RTC introduces a new P4 architecture model and a set of beneficial extern constructs to fully leverage the RTC architecture’s programmability. Besides, we share the insights we have gained from designing and implementing compilers. We also provide a performance model to facilitate profiling P4RTC’s performance on user-customized P4 code. We prototype P4RTC on an RTC chip with 1.2 Tbps bandwidth. Case-oriented evaluation demonstrates that P4RTC can enhance P4 programmability and reduce the burdens of RTC development. The performance model can provide substantial insights into optimizing P4RTC programs.
items.abstract_zh: P4可编程数据平面显着加速了各种网络技术的演进。尽管P4语言获得了广泛接受，但其进一步发展遇到了两个障碍：有限的可编程性和下一代Tofino芯片的停产。作为硬件制造商，我们尝试通过开放运行到完成（RTC）芯片的 P4 可编程性来解决上述困境。目前，该领域还没有公开的经验。我们推出 P4RTC，全面整合了我们将 P4 语言应用于 RTC 架构的经验。 P4RTC 引入了新的 P4 架构模型和一组有益的外部构造，以充分利用 RTC 架构的可编程性。此外，我们还分享了从设计和实现编译器中获得的见解。我们还提供了一个性能模型，以方便分析 P4RTC 在用户定制的 P4 代码上的性能。我们在带宽为 1.2 Tbps 的 RTC 芯片上制作了 P4RTC 原型。面向案例的评估表明，P4RTC可以增强P4的可编程性并减轻RTC开发的负担。性能模型可以为优化 P4RTC 程序提供重要的见解。

items.title: Optimizing RLHF Training for Large Language Models with Stage Fusion.
items.abstract: We present RLHFuse, an efficient training system with stage fusion for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Due to the intrinsic nature of RLHF training, i.e., the data skewness in the generation stage and the pipeline bubbles in the training stage, existing RLHF systems suffer from low GPU utilization. RLHFuse breaks the traditional view of RLHF workflow as a composition of individual tasks, splitting each task into finer-grained subtasks, and performing stage fusion to improve GPU utilization. RLHFuse contains two key ideas. First, for generation and inference tasks, RLHFuse splits them into sample-level subtasks, enabling efficient inter-stage fusion to overlap the execution of generation and inference stages, thus mitigating the original generation bottleneck dominated by long-tailed samples. Second, for training tasks, RLHFuse breaks them into subtasks of micro-batches and performs intra-stage fusion to concurrently execute these subtasks in the training stage with a fused pipeline schedule, effectively mitigating the pipeline bubbles. The experiments show that RLHFuse increases the training throughput by up to 3.7×, compared to existing systems.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 RLHFuse，这是一种具有阶段融合的高效训练系统，用于人类反馈强化学习 (RLHF)。由于 RLHF 训练的本质，即生成阶段的数据偏斜和训练阶段的管道气泡，现有 RLHF 系统的 GPU 利用率较低。 RLHFuse 打破了 RLHF 工作流程由单个任务组成的传统观点，将每个任务拆分为更细粒度的子任务，并进行阶段融合以提高 GPU 利用率。 RLHFuse 包含两个关键思想。首先，对于生成和推理任务，RLHFuse 将其拆分为样本级子任务，实现高效的阶段间融合，以重叠生成和推理阶段的执行，从而缓解原来由长尾样本主导的生成瓶颈。其次，对于训练任务，RLHFuse 将其分解为微批次的子任务，并进行阶段内融合，以融合的流水线调度在训练阶段同时执行这些子任务，有效地减少了流水线气泡。实验表明，与现有系统相比，RLHFuse 的训练吞吐量提高了 3.7 倍。

items.title: High-level Programming for Application Networks.
items.abstract: Application networks facilitate communication between the microservices of cloud applications. They are built today using service meshes with low-level specifications that make it difficult to express application-specific functionality (e.g., access control based on RPC fields), and they can more than double the RPC latency. We develop AppNet, a framework that makes it easy to build expressive and high-performance application networks. Developers specify rich RPC processing in a high-level language with generalized match-action rules and built-in state management. We compile the specifications to high-performance code after optimizing where (e.g., client, server) and how (e.g., RPC library, proxy) each RPC processing element runs. The optimization uses symbolic abstraction and execution to judge if different runtime configurations of possibly-stateful RPC processing elements are semantically equivalent for arbitrary RPC streams. Our experiments show that AppNet can express common application network function in only 7-28 lines of code. Its optimizations lower RPC processing latency by up to 82%.
items.abstract_zh: 应用程序网络促进云应用程序的微服务之间的通信。如今，它们是使用具有低级规范的服务网格构建的，这使得表达特定于应用程序的功能（例如，基于 RPC 字段的访问控制）变得困难，并且它们可能会使 RPC 延迟增加一倍以上。我们开发了 AppNet，这是一个可以轻松构建富有表现力和高性能的应用程序网络的框架。开发人员使用高级语言指定丰富的 RPC 处理，并具有通用的匹配操作规则和内置状态管理。在优化每个 RPC 处理元素的运行位置（例如客户端、服务器）以及运行方式（例如 RPC 库、代理）后，我们将规范编译为高性能代码。该优化使用符号抽象和执行来判断可能有状态的 RPC 处理元素的不同运行时配置对于任意 RPC 流在语义上是否等效。我们的实验表明，AppNet 只需 7-28 行代码即可表达常见的应用网络功能。其优化可将 RPC 处理延迟降低高达 82%。
